Name: Group Nirmal
Description:
Group Nirmal under the leadership of our founder and visionary Shri Ram Autar Saraf laid the foundation of a small steel drawing unit in the year 1971. After many years of hard labour and despite turbulent conditions, in the year 1985 he went a step forward and put up a steel wire galvanising plant under the name of Nirmal Wires Pvt. Ltd. This was an act of forward integration to the existing drawing operation. At this stage, Mr. Nirmal Saraf, Mr. Raman Saraf and Mr. Piyush Saraf joined the business, and together the team knew no limits. In a few years, we established a flourishing business in the field of steel wires.

Under the direction of our third generation of leaders, Mr. Varun Saraf, Mr. Prateek Saraf, Mr. Vidyut Saraf and Mr. Parag Saraf, we built up a clientele who were extremely happy with the quality of the products manufactured and services rendered. From here,we moved from one milestone to another, now manufacturing a wide range of world-class products including Galvanised and Black Steel Wires, Conductors, Construction Steel, Welding Electrodes and Hot Rolled Steel Products with an annual capacity of 1,80,000 metric tonnes.

Being innovative leaders in the manufacturing of steel wires, our quality speaks for our products. Our retail segment also caters to a wide range of Agricultural Wires catering to farming, vineyards, poultry, security as well as Electrodes under Nirmal- 6013. These are available at retail counters pan-India.

Name: CGR International
Description: Founded in 1963, CGR has always sought to be close to our clients wherever they are, supported by our workforce of 1,500 people and 24 production sites on 4 continents. We specialize in co-engineering and serial production of mechanical-end mechatronic components by cold transformation and overmolding of metal. Our autonomous production units share the same methodology, offering high reactivity, consistent quality and secure supply around the world. A global footprint that means we can deliver high volumes with optimized logistics.

Name: Maktel Makina ve Tel Sanayii A.Ş.
Description:
Maktel, holds a leading position in its sector with its longstanding history and innovative vision. With its experience since back to 1971, it specializes in superior and high-quality spring production.
We carefully evaluate feedback to understand our customers' needs and provide them with the most suitable solutions, while closely following technology and all innovations.
With more than 150 experienced, each of whom is specialized in their field, we work in harmony and unity to maintain customer satisfaction at the highest level. Honesty, quality, and continuous improvement principles are at the heart of our business.
Sustainability and environmental consciousness are also fundamental values of our company. 
Maktel, continues to maintain its leading position in the industry with its emphasis on reliability, quality, and customer satisfaction, and eagerly progresses towards the future.

Name: Berkenhoff GmbH (bedra)
Description:
As a top international manufacturer of high-quality precision wires and alloys of non-ferrous metals, we distinguish ourselves in the market through high quality and smart services. Absolute customer focus. This is a long tradition for us – ever since the company was founded in 1889. Our ability to innovate, along with our well-known reliability, set us apart. These two strengths have made bedra a leader in quality and a leader in the market. Year after year, our plants produce more than 30 million kilometers of precision wire and rods – in over 100 alloy versions.
Added value for our customers. This is the yardstick for all our successes. As early as 1889, company founder Carl Berkenhoff, with his „fine wire drawing facility“ in Herborn-Merkenbach, Germany, was characterized by a central idea: to offer his customers more than others offer. Over the company‘s more than 135-year history, this understanding of customer proximity and orientation has grown into an enduring constant.
Today our products and services are represented in over 50 countries. Customers worldwide value bedra as a reliable partner for sustainable solutions in the fields of innovative high-tech precision wires for spark erosion, welding and brazing technology, electronic components, and special applications. Our high-performance alloys are also supplied as rods and bars for multiple industrial applications.
intelligent wires. Made by bedra. This is our quality promise. We operate in all the important areas of the world. We are one of the few global manufacturers of precision wires and alloys that represents the entire production chain: Casting, rolling, drawing, annealing, and electroplating. Our customers benefit from our depth of in-house production through 100% traceability, consistent high quality, and the highest possible processing reliability. 

Imprint: https://www.bedra.com/en/imprint/
Data privacy: https://www.bedra.com/en/data-privacy/

Name: Central Wire Group of Companies
Description:
Central Wire Group of Companies (CWI) is a world renown manufacturing company that specializes in wire and wire products. Through continued success of their flagship brand Central Wire has become the largest re-drawer of stainless steel and nickel alloy wire in North America providing products used in mission critical applications that require high tolerances, resistance to corrosion and durability. Additionally, through strategic investments, Central Wire has acquired or created multiple brands to help grow, or enter new and emerging markets.  These companies include; Loos & Co. Inc., Sanlo Inc., Strand Core, Central Wire Industries UK Ltd., GD-SUPA SLICKLINES, and CWI WELDING Generation4. 

Central Wire offers many specialty alloy products such as stainless steel, nickel, cobalt, copper, brass, bronze, and zinc. Its products include ulta-fine and fine wire, cold heading wire/bars, forming and EPQ wire, lashing wire, spring wire, measuring line wire, belt wire, shaped wire, resistance wire, as well as welding wire. Additionally,  straightened and cut lengths, profiles, strand, and multiple-end bobbin wire products are also provided in addition to cold heading, spring making, and wire forming.

CWI was founded in 1955 and is headquartered in Perth, Ontario, Canada and now maintains 11 manufacturing and distribution facilities throughout the U.S., Canada and the U.K. CWI  has over 400 employees selling products to customers in more than 50 countries.

Other value added products include strands, wire rope, cable and engineered cable assemblies.  CWI products are found in virtually every manufacturing industry segment including; aerospace, appliances, architecture, automotive, construction, defense, food processing, marine, medical, mining, oil and gas, paper, petrochemical, recreation, textiles, and utilities. 

For more information, visit www.centralwire.com

Name: Bellite Springs Pvt Ltd
Description: Manufacturers of Torsion, Tension, Suspension & Compression Springs & Wire Forms for Automotive, Electrical, Electronic & Agricultural Industry.

Name: Syscon Wires
Description:
Syscon Wire is the Flagship brand of CHQ wires under the umbrella of Systematic wires Pvt Ltd.
 
Syscon wires is engaged in the CHQ wire Manufacturing industry Since 2005. With our HO in Mumbai and manufacturing Plants in Khopoli, Raigad. We take pride in providing the best quality wire in India & abroad.
 
Leading Manufacturer of best quality CHQ Wires and Alloy Steel Wires for fasteners, bearings, and other automotive applications.

Specialty of Spheroidizing Annealing High-Quality Wire Drawing.

Name: Springmaster (Pty)Ltd
Description:
With over 35 years’ experience in spring manufacturing.

Springmaster was established 35 years ago, certified to IATF 16949, and ISO9001:2015 quality system certification. Company staff are skilled with a diversity of training.
Employing over 40 staff and covering 3000sqm, Springmaster has established itself as one of South Africa's leading automotive and industrial component spring manufacturers.

Name: H D WIRE (P) LTD
Description:
H D wire was established in the year 1988 and is now a recognized name in the manufacturing, supply and trading of unlimited compilation of galvanized wires and cables. The manufacturing story of H D wire (P) Ltd. started back in the year 1994 in Indore, India. Apart from MS wire material which includes annealed binding wire in various sizes, products like G.I welded mesh, MS welded mesh, brass stitching wire, mild steel wire for general engineering purpose, hard drawn steel wire for concrete reinforcement, GI steel core wire for aluminium conductors for high voltage etc. are among those wide array of products which are available with H D wire.

We offer a large range of quality products to our customers. We also customize our products to meet their specific requirements if any. H D  Wire is one of the biggest wire manufacturing companies in central India.

Name: Deacero Summit
Description: We are a global leading company dedicated to the manufacture, production, sale, and distribution of carbon steel wires and specialized products for parts and components in the automotive, aerospace, Industrial, and indoor & outdoor vehicle sectors.

Name: Precision Global Springs Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Precision Global Springs Pvt. Ltd. (PGSPL) is a leading manufacturer and supplier of high-quality springs and wire forms. With 50 years of experience in the industry, we have built a reputation for excellence in product quality, customer service, and innovation.

Our state-of-the-art manufacturing facilities are equipped with advanced technology and machinery, allowing us to produce a wide range of custom springs and wire forms that meet the unique needs of our customers. We specialize in the production of compression springs, extension springs, torsion springs, tulip/garter springs, wire forms, and spring assemblies for a variety of industries, including automotive, aerospace, medical, and more.

At Precision Global Springs, we are committed to providing our customers with the highest level of quality and service. Our team of experienced engineers and technicians work closely with our customers to design and manufacture customized products that meet their specific requirements. We pride ourselves on our ability to deliver innovative solutions that help our customers achieve their goals.

Name: EUROPRESSVIT Srl
Description:
Europressvit has been producing and distributing STAINLESS STEEL SCREWS and BOLTS worldwide since 1968.
A single reliable and dynamic organization able to PRODUCE INTERNALLY special screws and bolts and, in the same time, also able to deliver from stock thousands of standard items and special components that we implemented with turned parts, readily available through stock specifically dedicated to customer requirements.
Thanks also to our historical know how during over 50 years of sector and several partnerships established with important metalworking companies, EUROPRESSVIT proposes itself to the industry as a complete supplier of fixing systems.
A dual productive and commercial vocation that makes Europressvit the only leading company in its sector that for 50 years has guaranteed a supply for all types of industrial applications.
Competence, quality and good service for direct, efficient client - supplier cooperation.

Name: Mollificio Italiano srl
Description:
Mollificio Italiano has been a manufacturer and supplier-partner of springs and wire processed on request for 77 years, since 1945. 

We work on technical drawing and not for stock, thus maximizing the quality of service.

Name: Central Birmingham Springs Ltd
Description:
CBS is a spring and wire forming engineering company, and it is proud to offer its clients high quality and dependable components, from design through to manufacturing, enhancing and supporting the application of each component. CBS continues to invest heavily in machinery and personnel to underpin the future, and in 2023 we moved into the new site in Cradley Heath with our partner Stockton Engineering, ensuring predictability and responsiveness. 

Whether you have a new project, issue with an application or want to replace an existing spring or wireform, we can help. From samples through to JIT large scale manufacturing.

Name: PRESTRESS STEEL LLP
Description: Prestress Steel LLP (formerly known as Prestress Wire Industries) are manufacturers of top quality medium and high carbon steel wires for Infrastructure, Power, Automobiles and General Engineering sectors, since 1994. We currently own and operate 4 strategically located plants across India delivering an output exceeding 72,000 Metric Tons annually. We are a proud member of  the Gita Group which has a diversified presence across 30 locations across India.
Location: Dadra & Nagar Haveli, Daman and Diu

Name: Mollificio Valli srl
Description: Springs maker Mollificio Valli Srl is a modern and dynamic company with a flexible and efficient structure which has enabled it to become a reliable partner for important national and international industrial groups. The range of production includes compression springs, traction springs, torsion springs, shaped wire pieces, rings, blank and wire strips and special assemblies. The policy of continual technological renewal followed by Mollificio Valli Srl has the direct result that today more than 70% of the plant is entirely controlled by CNC and is also less than 10 years old. Company certificated against IATF 16949:2016, ISO 9001:2015 and ISO 14001:2015.

Name: PT. Everpro Indonesia Technologies
Description: Optical cables (AOC), optical fibers & cables, optoelectronic chips, optoelectronic modules

Name: brandgroup
Description:
The brandgroup is a medium-sized, german family-owned company. We develop and manufacture innovative and efficient springs, spring assemblies and wire forming parts for our customers.

Our springs make an important contribution in the automotive supply industry, the construction industry and other industrial applications. The brandgroup has several production facilities both inside and outside the EU. These include sites in Germany, France, Poland, UK, China, Mexico and the USA.

Name: Davis Wire Corporation
Description: With one of the most diverse product lines in the world, Davis Wire is capable of meeting virtually any wire need. From construction wire to welded wire fabric to screen mesh, our products are designed to meet your needs.

Name: Heinrich Eibach Gmbh
Description: Eibach has a worldwide reputation as a leading manufacturer of high-quality spring and suspension systems as well as special technical springs for demanding applications. The range of applications is very broad and covers almost all areas of industrial as well as automotive technology. Eibach combines the highest quality with the greatest possible flexibility and cost-effectiveness, both for smaller batch sizes and for larger series. The Eibach Group - with Eibach Industries as the holding company - is represented by its own production plants in Europe (Finnentrop, Germany), North America (Corona, CA, USA) and Asia (Taicang, China) as well as by its own engineering and sales offices in Australia, England and South Africa. Eibach serves customers in a further 80 countries with the support of regional partners. The total number of employees is about 550. As a family-owned company, all shares are in the hands of the family. The future is being built with the involvement of the Eibach Family Foundation.

Name: Dudek & Bock Spring Mfg Co
Description:
Dudek & Bock Spring Manufacturing Company is a leading manufacturer of custom springs, wireforms, metal stampings, and assemblies. We are thoroughly committed to the success of our customers. Since 1946, Dudek & Bock has built a solid reputation for quality, on-time delivery, and customer service. 
As a major supplier for many Fortune 500 companies, we utilize the latest quality control standards to ensure satisfaction. 

Our mission is to build superior customer satisfaction by integrating quality, responsiveness, technology and value. Our employees focus first on customer satisfaction and work together toward continuous improvement.

Name: Maschinenfabrik NIEHOFF GmbH & Co. KG
Description: NIEHOFF ist einer der weltweit führenden Anbieter von Drahtziehmaschinen und Ziehanlagen für die Draht- und Kabelindustrie.

Name: Bajrang Wire Products (India) Pvt. Ltd.
Description: Manufacturing a versatile range of Alloy & Non-Alloy Steel Wires for the Power & Infrastructure Sector playing a Proactive Role in developing India.

Name: HAGENS Group (Hagens A/S)
Description:
Welcome to Hagens Group

Hagens Group produces all types of metal components, springs, clips and stamping parts for various industries and purposes. However, that description is far too simplistic – our work encompasses much more than just that.

Our products are not standard items on a shelf. The process from development to production is based on customer-specific solutions, with a focus on functionality, quality, and cost-effectiveness.

Our efficient production and advanced manufacturing equipment guarantee that quality is top-notch and delivery times are met.

We develop our products from the ground up, offering specialized metal components and spring solutions – and we’re not afraid to take on more complex tasks.

Our products are therefore much more than just pieces of metal. We know this because, for more than 70 years, we’ve been providing solutions in springs and metal components for our customers – making us one of the leading producers of metal components and springs with branches worldwide.

Name: netzwerkdraht e.V.
Description:
Wir sind das starke Netzwerk der Drahtindustrie im deutschsprachigen Raum. Der **netzwerkdraht e.V.** vereint über 100 Unternehmen entlang der gesamten Wertschöpfungskette – von der Drahtherstellung über die Weiterverarbeitung bis hin zur Anwendungstechnik.

Unsere Mission: **Wissen teilen, Innovation fördern, Verbindungen schaffen**.
Als zentrale Branchenplattform organisieren wir Fachveranstaltungen, Seminare, Workshops und Publikationen zu aktuellen Themen wie Digitalisierung, Nachhaltigkeit, Qualitätssicherung und Energieeffizienz.

Ob Fachkräfte, Führungskräfte oder Technikbegeisterte – bei uns finden Sie praxisnahe Impulse, wertvolle Kontakte und ein engagiertes Netzwerk, das die Zukunft der Drahtindustrie aktiv gestaltet.

Sie sind Teil der Drahtbranche und möchten mehr erreichen?
Dann werden Sie Teil unseres Netzwerks! Jetzt folgen, vernetzen und gemeinsam die Zukunft der Drahtindustrie gestalten.

#Drahtindustrie #Netzwerk #Innovation #Weiterbildung #Technologie #Verbindung

Name: Mollificio Anastasia S.r.l.
Description:
Founded in 1975 the “MOLLIFICIO ANASTASIA” produces springs in wire and ribbon of any shape and dimension, in a modern factory that covers an area of 11000 square metres, of which 3000 are covered.

The production is absorbed from different sectors: industrial vehicles, ground movement machines, agricultural machines, frame accessory, locking units, accessory for sun awnings, taps, nautical sector, iron and steel industry, and so on.
A special section allows you to design and build propototypes in a very short period of time.
The use of high quality steel such as: carbon steel, steel allory, inconel, stainless steel: pre hardened. Phosphor bronze and the use of moder technologys, both in productions and in controls have led to hight quality product, appreciated by main user springs.

To ensure high quality standards, Mollificio Anastasia provides, on request, certificates of testing of the raw material

Name: Micro Spring Products
Description: Manufacturer of Metal Springs and PVC Coated Parts since 2008 in Chennai, Tamil Nadu.

Name: Alcomex Springs
Description:
Alcomex Springs Group offers its clients the best spring solutions in the market. Alcomex is the European market leader in door springs and is a recognized and respected specialist within the industrial spring industry. 

At Alcomex, we know and understand that our technical springs are an essential part of our clients' product application, installation or production process. Springs come in a variety of shapes and sizes. We focus on the optimal customer experience and want to exceed the expectations of our stakeholders. 

Since its founding in 1992, Alcomex has always been committed to serving customers with smart technical spring solutions. Exceeding expectations for people, environment and product is our mission. We make this happen through our one-stop-shop concept. In practice, this means that we are happy to help you out based on your situation from start to finish. 

We employ more than 30 dedicated spring specialists worldwide. We have modern production and distribution centers in the Netherlands, the Czech Republic, Germany, Poland, Romania, France, Spain and India. Alcomex strives to be the benchmark in terms of customer satisfaction, customer-specific spring solutions, operational production excellence and excellent quality. This is reflected in our day-to-day operations. With technical craftsmanship, leading testing facilities and prototyping capabilities, Alcomex can offer you an unprecedented unburdening experience in the field of technical springs.

We always make every effort to provide good communication, the best value for money and fast delivery for our customers. Curious about our range? Then check out our standard spring catalog: https://www.alcomexsprings.com/standard-springs/.

Do you have a challenge we can help you with? Then your Alcomex engineering team is here for you. Let us find a solution together. Please contact us! https://www.alcomexsprings.com/contact/

Name: Kritika Wires Limited
Description: KRITIKA WIRES LIMITED is a leading steel wire manufacturer having diversified product range and is based out of Kolkata, West Bengal, India.

Name: Pamukkale Kablo
Description: Pamukkale Kablo is a company based out of Atatürk Caddesi, Yeşilköy, İstanbul, Turkey.

Name: Alcomex Veren B.V.
Description:
Alcomex Springs Group biedt haar klanten de beste veeroplossingen in de markt. Alcomex is in Europa marktleider in deurveren en is een erkende en gerespecteerde specialist binnen de industriële veren branche. 

Bij Alcomex begrijpen we dat onze technische veren een essentieel onderdeel vormen in de producttoepassing, installatie of het productieproces van onze klanten. De veren zijn te verkrijgen in allerlei vormen en afmetingen. We staan voor een optimale klantbeleving en willen daarom de verwachtingen van onze stakeholders overtreffen. Exceeding expectations zoals we dit binnen Alcomex noemen.

Sinds de oprichting in 1992 heeft Alcomex zich altijd toegewijd om klanten te bedienen met slimme technische veeroplossingen. Het overtreffen van verwachtingen voor mens, milieu en product is onze missie. Dit maken wij waar dankzij ons “one-stop-shop”-concept. Dit betekent dat wij graag van begin tot eind met u en uw situatie meedenken. 

Er zijn meer dan 30 toegewijde veerspecialisten wereldwijd bij ons in dienst. We hebben moderne productie- en distributiecentra in Nederland, Tsjechië, Duitsland, Polen, Roemenië, Frankrijk, Spanje en India. Alcomex streeft ernaar de benchmark te zijn op het gebied van klanttevredenheid, klantspecifiek gemaakte veer oplossingen, operationele productie-excellentie en uitmuntende kwaliteit. Dat schemert door in de dagelijkse gang van zaken. Dankzij technische vakmanschap, leidende testfaciliteiten en de prototyping mogelijkheden kan Alcomex u een ongekend ontzorgende ervaring bieden op het gebied van technische veren.

Wij doen er altijd alles aan om goede communicatie, de beste prijs-kwaliteitverhouding en een snelle levering te kunnen bieden voor onze klanten. Benieuwd geworden naar ons assortiment? Bekijk dan eens onze standaard-veren catalogus: https://www.alcomex.nl/brochure

Heeft u een uitdaging waaraan wij mee mogen denken? Dan staat uw Alcomex-engineering team voor u klaar. Laat ons met u meedenken.
https://www.alcomex.nl/contact

Name: MOLLIFICIO LOMBARDO | Molle, componenti elastici e particolari tranciati | Standard o su disegno
Description:
Giunta alla V generazione, Mollificio Lombardo è un'azienda famigliare leader nella produzione di molle e componenti elastici di alta precisione destinati ad una vasta gamma di settori industriali, tra cui l'automotive, l'aerospaziale, l'elettronica, sportivo,  medicale, meccanico, l'energetico e molti altri. 
     
Da quando è nata nel 1932, l'azienda si è sempre distinta per l'impegno all’aggiornamento continuo dei propri sistemi produttivi: dall’originaria scelta di meccanizzare una lavorazione tipicamente artigianale, all’attuale adozione di macchine meccatroniche e altri sistemi produttivi come il taglio laser.  

Mollificio Lombardo è specializzato nella realizzazione di molle a compressione, molle a trazione, molle a torsione, molle sagomate, molle a flessione, assiemi e componenti tranciati etc etc 
     
L’expertise tecnica e l'uso di materiali di alta qualità permettono la realizzazione di prodotti su misura di altissima affidabilità, adatti a tutti i tipi di applicazione, anche le più complesse.

L’impegno per la qualità è certificato dalla compliance a numerosi standard internazionali, che garantiscono che i processi produttivi e i prodotti rispettino i più elevati standard di qualità e sostenibilità. Mollificio Lombardo è infatti certificato ISO 9001:2015 per il  sistema di gestione della qualità e possiede certificazioni specifiche per il settore automotive, come IATF 16949:2016. L’azienda è inoltre in fase di certificazione ISO 14001:2015 per la gestione ambientale.

Name: SCHERDEL Medtec
Description:
At SCHERDEL Medtec, we don't just provide solutions, we provide care. Making components for the medical industry offers the unique privilege to our employees and the community. 

We're proud to provide crucial, essential medical components to the people who need them. Scherdel employees understand that we manufacture more than just springs, we manufacture pieces of hope and health to individuals in need. At SCHERDEL Medtec, we believe that healthcare consists of two equal parts heath and care.

SCHERDEL Medtec is part of the SCHERDEL Group. With about 6,500 employees at 34 locations world wide, the SCHERDEL Group is a family-owned, leading company in the field of metal-forming with core competence in the production of engineering springs as well as of vehicle components and components for the medical market.

Name: Marvel Springs Inc.
Description:
Marvel Springs is a world-class manufacturer of precision springs, clips and wire form components.

With facilities located in the United States and South Africa, Marvel Springs has strategically positioned itself to support current customers and future customers alike.

Using the latest in CNC Spring Machinery, backed by State-of-the-art Quality Control equipment, Marvel Springs is able to deliver high-quality, precision products that fully meet client requirements at competitive rates and on-time delivery.

Whatever your needs, Marvel Springs is your trusted partner for superior design & engineering support, quality, and service

Name: ELSEWEDY STEEL
Description: Founded in 2006, Elsewedy Steel, a subsidiary of Elsewedy Electric, is a leading manufacturer in the steel downstream and wire drawing industry. We deliver specialized, high-performance reinforcement solutions to global markets across construction, infrastructure, automotive, energy, and heavy industry.

Name: Ace Wire Spring & Form Co., Inc.
Description: Ace Wire Spring & Form Company, Inc. is a leading spring manufacturer of Compression Springs, Extension Springs, Torsion Springs and Wire Forms and has been since 1939. Our years of experience allow us to offer a wide variety of custom precision springs to manufacturing clients. Our strength comes from our engineers and craftsmen who develop compression, extension, and torsion springs and wire forms for a large variety of applications. The benefit to you is a spring manufacturer that understands your needs, and can engineer compression, extension and torsion springs to meet your requirements and deliver a quality product faster than anyone in the industry. Contact our experts today to learn more or get a quote!

Name: KERN LIEBERS Villingen-Schwenningen GmbH
Description:
MEDER ist ein mittelständisches Unternehmen mit Sitz im Schwarzwald und produziert Federn von höchster Präzision und Qualität in kleinsten Abmessungsbereichen. Unser Know-how hat viele Formen. Ob Druckfedern, Zugfedern, Schenkelfedern oder Drahtteile und Stanzbiegeteile – MEDER Federn sind mit höchster Genauigkeit gefertigt und verleihen einer Vielzahl von Produkten erst die eigentliche Funktionalität.

Impressum: https://www.federmeder.de/de/impressum/

Name: Carl Stahl Technocables GmbH
Description:
We started out as a small rope manufacturer over 130 years ago. Today, we are an innovative manufacturer and development supplier operating worldwide. Our company has in-depth expertise and decades of experience.
As a development supplier of rope solutions in the micro wire rope sector, we offer tailor-made solutions for the individual requirements of our customers. 
Our product range extends from wire ropes, strands, and bowden cables to ready-made rope solutions. We rely on proven standard processes as well as new technologies, materials, and processing techniques.
Our cable solutions are used in numerous industries, including medical technology, robotics, mechanical engineering, automation, aerospace, and plant engineering.
As a partner, we see ourselves not only as a supplier of components, but also as a consultant. We understand the challenges our customers face and work with them to develop tailor-made solutions: from precise needs analysis and the selection of suitable components to implementation in the respective systems. 
We attach great importance to the quality and reliability of our products.
We offer development and manufacturing from a single source with a high degree of vertical integration: from wire rope production and the processing of wire ropes and strands to assemblies and packaging.

Name: Xinfeng Metal Technology Co., Ltd.
Description:
Xinfeng Metal Technology Co., Ltd. was  founded in 1992 , supplying steel wire & rope for customers . 
After 30 years of development, Xinfeng's production scale is constantly expanding, and we have more excellent employees and partners. We have always been committed to producing high-end steel wire and wire rope products with high production standards. With the efforts of all employees, our company is constantly improving. We are always working hard for what we love.

Name: Stockton Engineering
Description:
Stockton Engineering is a family owned and managed business, built around values of trust and dedication to provide our customers with high quality, precision engineered products, 100% of the time. We are specialised on presswork, wire and strip forming to supply a diverse range of products into multiple market sectors.
Our main objective of providing the best customer experience with reliability and integrity has been the key to building a diverse customer base that has included several class leading Automotive OEMs & Tier1’s and leading organisations in the Construction, Aerospace, Packaging, Rail & General Engineering Sectors.

Name: VDF FEDERN Gruppe
Description:
Die VDF FEDERN Gruppe ist in den Bereichen Federntechnik, Stanz-Biegetechnik und Fahrwerktechnik aktiv. Zu der Gruppe gehören die Unternehmen:
• VDF VOGTLAND Federntechnik GmbH
• KREUTZER Stanz-Biegetechnik GmbH & Co. KG
• VOGTLAND Autosport GmbH

Das Unternehmen VDF VOGTLAND Federntechnik ist ein spezialisiertes Produktionsunternehmen für Technische Federn aus Draht und Band sowie entsprechende Baugruppen und Komponenten.

Das Unternehmen KREUTZER Stanz-Biegetechnik ist spezialisiert auf Federn aus Bandmaterial sowie Stanz- und Biegeteile.

Namhafte Firmen aus der Automobilzulieferindustrie, aus dem Maschinen- und Anlagenbau sowie für weitere Investitions-Güter setzen auf die Entwicklungs- und Produktionskompetenz unseres Federnverbundes. Ein auf Kundenanforderungen zugeschnittenes Dienstleistungspaket rundet das Programm ab.

Das Unternehmen VOGTLAND Autosport entwickelt, montiert und vertreibt qualitativ hochwertige Produkte der Fahrwerktechnik wie Tieferlegungsfedern, Sportfahrwerke und Gewindefahrwerke.

Wir sind ein Inhaber geführtes Familienunternehmen mit kurzen Entscheidungswegen und langfristigen Zielen. Wir – Mitarbeiterinnen, Mitarbeiter und Geschäftsführung - stehen für höchste Fachkompetenz und Engagement für unsere Kunden!

Name: Tessitura Tele Metalliche Rossi
Description:
Dal 1959, TTM Rossi rappresenta l'eccellenza del Made in Italy nella produzione di tessuti metallici. La nostra storia di oltre 60 anni è caratterizzata da innovazione, qualità e sostenibilità 

Filtraggio Industriale 
Leader nel settore del filtraggio industriale, forniamo soluzioni avanzate per vari settori, garantendo efficienza e affidabilità. I nostri filtri metallici sono sinonimo di qualità e prestazioni superiori.

Metal Design 
Trasformiamo il metallo in arte, offrendo soluzioni di design che uniscono estetica e funzionalità. I nostri prodotti trovano applicazione in architettura, arredamento e interior design.

FC MeltFilterBand 
Il nastro FC MeltFilterBand è un prodotto di punta nel filtraggio per il riciclo delle materie plastiche, raccomandato dai leader di mercato per la sua resistenza e qualità. Questo prodotto brevettato garantisce alte prestazioni e continuità di filtraggio.

Impegno e Visione
Siamo dedicati a innovare continuamente, mantenendo un forte impegno verso la sostenibilità. La nostra missione è superare le aspettative dei clienti, offrendo prodotti personalizzati e servizi eccellenti.

Se desideri collaborare con un partner affidabile e innovativo nel settore delle tele metalliche, contattaci oggi stesso. Siamo pronti a trasformare le tue idee in realtà. 
 https://www.ttmrossi.it/ 
Visita il nostro sito per saperne di più

Name: Step Cables
Description:
Step Cables is a leading name in the electric wire and cable manufacturing industry, backed by over two decades of experience and innovation. With a strong commitment to quality, safety, and performance, the company has earned a reputation as one of the fastest-growing players in the cable sector.

Specializing in a wide range of electric wires and cables, Step Cables caters to residential, commercial, and industrial applications. Every product is manufactured using advanced technology and superior raw materials, ensuring durability, high conductivity, and safety. The company adheres to strict quality control standards and follows national and international compliance guidelines to meet the growing demands of a rapidly evolving market.

Driven by a vision to deliver excellence, Step Cables constantly invests in research, development, and customer satisfaction. Their skilled team of professionals ensures each product meets the highest benchmarks of quality and reliability. Whether it's power cables, control cables, or building wires, Step Cables delivers efficient and long-lasting solutions tailored to diverse needs.

As a trusted brand in the industry, Step Cables is not just connecting wires — it's connecting homes, businesses, and industries with integrity, innovation, and commitment. With its consistent growth, the company is powering a brighter and safer future.

Name: Veena Springs Mfg & Co.
Description: A Spring Manufacturing Company with ISO 9001:2015 Certification with all testing Equipment and more than 40 Years of Expertise.

Name: Mach Connections
Description: Mach Connections, a subsidiary of the Correct Craft family of companies, specializes in OEM panel production, hydro graphics, wire harness manufacturing, and battery cable assemblies. The company is recognition as a leader in the industry, providing high-quality products and exceptional customer service. Their team of experts possess extensive experience in the marine industry, dedicated to identifying and providing the most suitable electrical solutions for their clients.

Name: Springco
Description:
Springco (N.I.) Limited: Precision Springs & Components Manufacturer

Established in 1954, Springco is a leading manufacturer of precision springs and components based in Portadown, Northern Ireland. With 70 years of expertise, we specialise in crafting high-quality compression, tension, torsion, and flat springs, as well as intricate wire forms and tube forming solutions.

Our Expertise
• Precision spring manufacturing
• Exotic metal fabrication (nickel & cobalt alloys)
• Bespoke component solutions

Industries We Serve
Aerospace | Space Technology | Medical Equipment | Defence | Offshore & Sub-Sea | Valve Manufacturing | Renewable Energy | Nuclear | General Engineering

Why Choose Springco?
• 70 years of manufacturing excellence
• AS9100 Rev C and ISO9001 certified
• Global exporter serving 5 continents
• Contributor to prestigious space missions (JUICE, BepiColombo, GAIA)
• £2.9 million annual turnover with strong financial performance

Ready to Elevate Your Engineering Solutions?
 Visit our website to explore our full range of capabilities
 Contact us for a consultation on your specific requirements
 Connect with our team to discuss potential collaborations

Join Our Network
Follow Springco to stay updated on our latest innovations, industry insights, and exciting projects in precision engineering and space technology.

#PrecisionEngineering #AerospaceManufacturing #SpaceTechnology #MadeInNorthernIreland

Name: Westfälische Drahtindustrie
Description:
Willkommen bei Westfälische Drahtindustrie, dem größten konzernfreien Drahtproduzenten Europas für Qualitätsdraht. Seit nunmehr über 160 Jahren fertigt die WDI an 15 Standorten mit ca. 1.300 Mitarbeitern diverse Qualitätsdrahtprodukte und Drahtlitzen. Das mittelständische Unternehmen wird seit 2009 von der Geschäftsführerin Katja Pampus bereits in 2.-ter Generation geführt.

In den Haupt-Geschäftsbereichen produziert die WDI Qualitätsdraht, Blankstahl, Baustahl und Hochleistungsseile. In weiteren vier Geschäftsbereichen produzieren wir an mehreren Standorten Schweissdraht, Spannstahl und Freileitungsseile. Am Standort Gandersheim fertigen wir Viereckgeflecht in vielen Abmessungen und Ausführungen sowie alles für den professionellen Zaunbau.

Die wichtigsten Absatzmärkte für WDI Drahtprodukte sind Draht und Blankstahl für den Maschinenbau, Baustahlmatten für die Bauindustrie, Draht und Blankstahl für den Automotive-Sektor und Drahtlitzen für Freileitungsseile (Energiewirtschaft).

Name: Fabryka Sprężyn "Mazowianka" Sp z o.o.
Description:
Fabryka Sprężyn Mazowianka - producent sprężyn, elementów sprężystych i wyrobów giętych z drutów prowadzi swoją działalność od 1958 roku.
Zakład osiągnął wysoką pozycję na rynku krajowym i zagranicznym, dzięki zdobytemu doświadczeniu w konstrukcji, doradztwie i produkcji sprężyn. Nasze wyroby cechuje wysoka jakość i dokładność wykonania.

Jesteśmy wiodącym producentem sprężyn dla przemysłu:

motoryzacyjnego,
ciągnikowego,
maszyn rolniczych,
meblarskiego,
sprzętu gospodarstwa domowego,
oraz elektromaszynowego.
Działalność produkcyjna od 2002 roku prowadzona jest w Zakładzie w Tomicach. Zlokalizowanie produkcji w nowym obiekcie, duże doinwestowanie w nowoczesne zautomatyzowane środki produkcji, wprowadzenie systemu Zarządzania Jakością zgodnego z normą EN ISO 9001:2000 czyni z nas godnego partnera do współpracy z dotychczasowymi i nowymi odbiorcami i dostawcami.

Priorytetowym celem Zakładu jest stały rozwój firmy, poprzez unowocześnianie procesu produkcji, podnoszenie kwalifikacji załogi, a tym samym uzyskanie większej satysfakcji i zadowolenia naszych klientów.

Zapraszamy do współpracy.

Name: GUTMANN ALUMINIUM DRAHT GMBH
Description:
GUTMANN ALUMINIUM DRAHT GMBH (GAD) is a leading German manufacturer of high-quality drawn aluminium round wires, rods, and profile bars. Our products, available in a wide range of sizes, lengths, and alloys, serve key industries such as automotive, medical technology, joining technology, electrical & mechanical engineering, and the food industry. 

With a fully integrated value chain, we ensure precision, innovation, and reliability in every wire and bar we produce—delivering solutions that power the future.. 

 #wewiretheworldsustainably

Name: Janaki Cable Industries
Description: Janaki Cable Industries, a trusted name in cable manufacturing, brings you cutting-edge solutions for house wiring, enamel wires, power cables, and overhead conductors with a commitment to excellence that drive progress.

Name: Spiraling OOC
Description: Manufacturer of spiral wire products used in precast and prestress concrete products. We produce a variety of different sizes, shapes, and bundle count to suit our customer's needs. Our products meet ASTM specifications for wire products.  We are located on the I-10 corridor for convenient and competitive shipping.

Name: Mollificio MB
Description: Mollificio MB's spring manufacture can be based on customer’s drawings and samples, or tailor-made to meet specific requirements. Thanks to the synergy between a craftsmanship know-how accumulated over 60 years of experience, and the latest technology, we are able to guide you through the customization of the product. We consider ourselves to be our clients’ partners and not just suppliers: our service goes from preliminary consulting and prototyping to post-sales assistance.

Name: FRÖNDENBERGER Drahtwerk GmbH
Description:
Seit 1914 ihr zuverlässiger Partner im Drahtgeschäft

Unsere Fabrikation in Fröndenberg befindet sich inmitten des traditionsreichen Zentrums der deutschen Drahtziehereien. Produzenten von Schrauben, Muttern, Nieten und Hersteller von Kaltumformteilen sowie Automobilzulieferer haben sich hier ebenfalls niedergelassen.

Mit unserem fachlich qualifizierten Mitarbeitern und einem modernen Maschinenpark stellen wir uns den immer neuen Anforderungen an die technischen Eigenschaften unseres Produktes. Wir entwickeln in partnerschaftlicher Zusammenarbeit mit unseren Kunden individuell angepasste Lösungen für Werkstoffe, Oberflächen und Aufmachungen.

Neben den auf Kundenwunsch speziell angefertigten Drähten, produzieren wir hauptsächlich hochwertige Stahldrähte für die Speichen-, Seil- und Federnindustrie.

Wir sind uns unserer gesellschaftlichen, ökonomischen und ökologischen Verantwortung bewusst und fühlen uns verpflichtet, durch Optimierung von Methoden, Abläufen und den Einsatz geeigneter Mittel die Umwelt nachhaltig zu schützen. Das Fröndenberger Drahtwerk ist zertifiziert nach den Richtlinien der ISO 9001:2015 sowie der Energieeffizienznorm ISO 50001:2011.

Name: KLIMZA
Description:
Firma KLIMZA powstała w 1989 roku jako firma rodzinna i do dziś funkcjonuje w takiej formie. W okresie ponad trzydziestoletniej dzałalności została jednym z najwiekszych producentów sprężyn w Polsce. Celem firmy jest produkowanie sprężyn oraz elementów giętych z drutu, wykonanych na podstawie zamówienia, rysunku lub wzorca w dogodnym dla klienta terminie - spełniając przy tym oczekiwania pod względem jakości.
W stałej ofercie posiada ponad tysiąc pozycji magazynowych. Głównym obszarem działalności jest branża rolnicza, gdzie produkowane sprężyny trafiają na montaże największych producentów maszyn w kraju i za granicą. Z powodzeniem wykonuje tez sprężyny znajdujące zastosowanie w dowolnych gałęziach przemysłu takich jak: meblarstwo, energetyka, branża ogrodowa, przemysł medyczny i wiele innych.

Name: Molex - Indústria E Comércio De Molas, Lda.
Description:
Founded in 1994, Molex is regarded as a reliable supplier of precision springs. 
Committed to excellence in spring manufacturing, today, our modern operations offer latest technology, consistent quality, increased efficiency and optimum value. 

We currently export to more than 12 countries in 3 continents (America, Europe and Asia) in various industries but mainly automotive. Our ability to deliver exceptional quality to the industry awarded us with the prestigious IATF 16949 certification.

Environmentally conscious, our ISO 14001 certification demonstrates our dedication to environmental management, minimizing our ecological footprint and ensuring sustainability in our processes.

Name: Mollificio Bortolussi srl
Description: Il Mollificio Bortolussi progetta e realizza elementi metallici elastici per applicazioni diverse da oltre 50 anni. La nostra esperienza ci permette di gestire tutte le fasi del processo, dalla progettazione alla produzione, dalle analisi metallurgiche alle prove a fatica. Lavoriamo in sinergia con i nostri clienti per individuare le soluzioni tecnicamente ed economicamente più aderenti alle loro esigenze. Siamo in grado di offrire molle a compressione, trazione, torsione, sagomate in filo, sagomate in piatto, molle in nastro tranciate, stampate, piegate e a carico costante. In base al loro impiego possono essere realizzate in diversi materiali tra cui principalmente fili di acciaio per molle EN 10270-1 e inossidabile per molle EN 10270-3, fili rame e sue leghe EN 12166, nastri di acciaio per molle EN 10132-4 e inossidabile per molle EN 10151, nastri rame e sue leghe EN 1652, nastri basso tenore di carbonio EN 10111. I nostri prodotti trovano applicazioni in diversi settori, tra cui macchinari industriali, elettrodomestici, illuminotecnica, elettronica, automotive, nautica, edilizia, agricoltura, tessile, arredamento, sport e medicale.

Name: MSSC Ahle GmbH
Description:
Seit Gründung des Unternehmens im Jahre 1904 beruht der Erfolg von MSSC AHLE auf seiner hohen Flexibilität. Zahlreiche Innovationen und Weiterentwicklungen sind aus genau dieser Beweglichkeit und Anpassungsfähigkeit entstanden.
Das macht uns heute – über 100 Jahre später – zu einem wichtigen Partner der Automobilindustrie und anderer Branchen.
Die Datenschutzinformation für unsere Social Media Auftritte findet sich unter https://www.ahle-federn.com/datenschutzerklarung

Name: COLOMBO SEVERO E FIGLIO ERMANNO SRL
Description: PRODUZIONE DI CHIODI SPECIALI , CHIODI CALIBRATI E PARTICOLARI A DISEGNO

Name: Rudolf Eckel Federnfabrik GmbH
Description:
Über Uns:
Wir sind eine eingeschworene Truppe von individuellen Typen, die direkt und unkompliziert wie die Leute hier sind. Unsere Expertise basiert auf Jahren erfolgreicher Arbeit für zufriedene Kunden. Mit unseren "Muckis im Kopf" sind wir stolz darauf, technische kaltgeformte Federn, Baugruppen, Biegeteile und Flachfedern anzubieten, sei es in der Kleinserie oder für Massenproduktionen.

Unsere Stärken:
Unsere Stärke liegt in der Vielfalt unserer Teammitglieder, von denen jeder über speziellen Sachverstand verfügt. Wir setzen diesen ein, um maßgeschneiderte Lösungen von der Konstruktion bis zur Serienproduktion zu entwickeln. Wir unterstützen Sie auch gerne bei Ihrer Produktentwicklung, und unser ausgezeichnetes Qualitätsmanagement gewährleistet die höchsten Standards in jedem Schritt des Prozesses.

Qualitätssicherung:
Unsere prozessbegleitende Qualitätssicherung ist integraler Bestandteil unserer Arbeitsweise. Unsere Prüfcenter sind modern ausgestattet und unsere Zertifizierungen entsprechen den aktuellen Anforderungen, einschließlich IATF 16949 und DIN EN ISO 9001.

Bei uns erhalten Sie nicht nur erstklassige Produkte, sondern auch die Gewissheit, dass Sie von einem engagierten Team unterstützt werden, das Ihre Anforderungen versteht. Kontaktieren Sie uns heute, um herauszufinden, wie wir Ihnen im Bereich technischer Federn, Baugruppen und mehr helfen können.

Name: Shamba
Description:
Wire Products Limited (WPL) is a member of the Industrial Promotional Services (IPS) Group of Companies. Widely known for SHAMBA the brand, our products range from heavy gauge chain links, colour coated chain links, barbed wire, galvanized wire and razor wire to gabion boxes, nails, galvmesh, weld-mesh and BRC’s.
Throughout our lifetime, we have continued to serve the local and export markets within East Africa with our high quality wire products. SHAMBA has since grown to be known for quality, reliability, durability and affordability.
At WPL, we are very keen on producing goods that are affordable and yet made to the highest standards possible. Today, we take pride in being the only company in East Africa manufacturing the barb-end chainlink, the galvmesh, the colour-coated chain link and our super high tensile barbed wire that features a single-strand wire design. Our barb-end chain link, for instance, was used in the recent fencing of the Jomo Kenyatta International Airport, manufactured and supplied by WPL. 
We are committed to the enhancement of energy efficiency and energy management best practices viable to our facility.

Name: Mihan Noor Wire Industries
Description:
With over three decades of experience in producing various types of metal wires including annealed wire, galvanized wire, iron wire, ribbed wire, wire rod and related products such as hexagonal wire mesh ,Gabion, barbed wire, Razor wire, PVC coated galvanized wire and Mesh, Mihan Noor wire industries is recognized as a pioneer in this industry in Iran. Throughout these years, our primary goal has always been to provide high-quality products and ensure customer satisfaction.
Mihan Noor Company, utilizing modern technologies and a skilled and dedicated team, produces superior quality products. The relentless efforts of our managers, technical staff and workers in improving quality and increasing production have led to sustainable growth and development of the company. Our commitment to quality and the use of premium raw materials have always been welcomed and praised by buyers, and our products are noted for their competitive prices and excellent quality in the market.
In recent years, considering the increasing demand in both domestic and international markets, Mihan Noor has managed to consolidate its position in the industry by expanding production lines and diversifying its products. Additionally, our efforts in exporting products to different countries have led to the expansion of international trade cooperation and increased our market share in this area and all over the world.
We take pride in being able to meet customer satisfaction with our high quality products and excellent services over these years, establishing ourselves as a reputable and trusted company in the wire industry. We always look forward to a bright future and sustainable development of the industry in our beloved country, Iran, and with the hard work and expertise of our staff, we stride toward new horizons and greater success

Name: Anamas Yay
Description:
Anamas Springs, established in 1978 in Konya, is one of Turkey’s most rooted and reliable companies in the spring manufacturing industry. With half a century of experience, we are not only a manufacturer but one of the key players in the sector, adding value to our customers. Today, we provide innovative and high-quality solutions to various industries, primarily in automotive, defense, agricultural machinery, and furniture sectors, in our modern production facility of 12,000 m² within a total area of 17,000 m².

Since our establishment, we have succeeded in becoming a reliable business partner by placing quality and customer satisfaction at the core of our operations. Every product we manufacture is designed to meet the most challenging technical requirements and produced in accordance with international quality standards. With our wide product range including compression springs, tension springs, torsion springs, wire forms, and custom-designed technical springs, we offer our engineering approach focused on durability and precision to our customers.

Every stage of our production process reflects our unwavering commitment to quality. At Anamas Springs, we pay meticulous attention not only in production but also in post-production inspections. In our advanced technology laboratories, each product undergoes comprehensive tests to ensure it meets high-performance and durability standards. This process ensures that we meet even the smallest details of customer requirements and provide reliability with every delivery.

We continue to strengthen our leading position in the industry with our commitment to continuous development and innovation. Our R&D center works to develop customized solutions for our customers and bring the technologies of the future to today. In this way, we offer products that meet not only today’s but also tomorrow’s expectations. Quality is not just a goal for Anamas Springs; it is the foundation of all our business processes.

Name: SULTAN TEL VE BUKUM SAN. TİC. LTD. ŞTİ
Description:
SULTAN TEL VE BÜKÜM SAN. TİC. LTD. olarak, 20 yılı aşkın üretim tecrübemizle Mobilya, Dekorasyon, Güvenlik, banyo ve mutfak alanları için fonksiyonel demir tel ürünleri tasarlıyor ve üretiyoruz.

Ürünlerimiz arasında:
 Banyo rafları, duş askılıkları
 Mutfak düzenleyicileri, tel sepetler
 Çok amaçlı organizer sistemler yer almaktadır.

Şıklık, dayanıklılık ve işlevselliği bir araya getiren tasarımlarımız; hem iç piyasada hem de uluslararası pazarda farklı markalar tarafından tercih edilmektedir.

Bugün güçlü markaların tedarikçisi olarak faaliyet gösteriyoruz ve OEM/ODM üretim kabiliyetimizle yeni iş birliklerine açığız.

 Toplu sipariş, özel üretim ve ihracat talepleriniz için bizimle iletişime geçebilirsiniz.



SULTAN TEL VE BÜKÜM SAN. TİC. LTD. is a leading manufacturer based in Turkey, specialized in wire products for furniture, decoration, safety equipment, kitchen and bathroom organization.

With over 20 years of experience, we design and produce high-quality, functional, and stylish wire products including:
• Bathroom racks & shower caddies
• Kitchen organizers & wire baskets
• Multi-purpose storage systems

Our products combine durability, practicality and modern design, and are widely preferred by both local and international brands.

 We are ready to support wholesalers, retailers, private label projects, and importers across Europe, the Middle East, and beyond.

 www.sultantelbukum.com
 info@sultantelbukum.com

Name: Nickunj EDM Wires & Consumables P Ltd
Description: We are one of the largest and most well reputed manufacturers of high-end EDM wires in India. Our plants are located at Umbergaon, Gujarat and Baddi, HP.
Golkonda Engineering Enterprises Ltd - India is a mechanical or industrial engineering company based out of /D, S. D. Road, Secunderabad, Hyderabad, Andhra Pradesh, India.

Name: Ropelmaq Indústria de Molas
Description: Fundada em abril de 1994, a empresa vem acompanhando as exigências do mercado, atendendo as indústrias automotiva, agrícola, moveleira, avicultura, entre outras. Ao longo destes anos vem desenvolvendo técnicas e modernizando seus equipamentos para garantir a eficiência e a durabilidade de seus produtos.
Location: Caxias do Sul, Rio Grande Do Sul

Name: Automated Wire Products, Inc.
Description:
At Automated Wire Products, we believe in doing one thing and doing it exceptionally well – that’s why ground compression springs are all we do. We’ve been a trusted name in the industry since 1995, continually refining our process to support our customers’ needs and desires efficiently and consistently.

We’ve developed strong relationships with leading organizations in the hydraulic industry, producing over 20 million ground compression springs each year to meet the industry’s demands effectively. Substantial investments in automation, including cutting-edge robots and world-class CNC spring coiling equipment, and a team of responsive and adaptable professionals means we possess the necessary experience and expertise to meet our customers’ requirements with 100% repeatability and 100% on-time delivery.

We understand the importance of upfront design assistance, which we provide on every quote. Our trusted quality system ensures that each part we produce is defect-free, meeting the highest quality standards. Furthermore, our streamlined process enables us to deliver prototypes in 10 days or less, with an average production lead time of four weeks. These unique aspects truly set us apart and make us the partner of choice for all your round wire compression spring and spring ring needs.

If you’re looking for a compression spring manufacturer with an unwavering commitment to excellence, advanced capabilities, and a customer-centric approach, look no further. Contact us today to request more information or schedule a visit!

Name: Schlenker Federn GmbH
Description: Seit mehr als 85 Jahren ist Schlenker Federn Spezialist für technische Federn. 2019 wurde Schlenker Federn in die Sauter Gruppe integriert und ist heute strategischer Partner von Marktführern aller Branchen (z. B. Automotive, Elektro- und Medizintechnik, Hausgeräte, ...) für die Entwicklung und Herstellung kundenspezifischer Federn bzw. Baugruppen. Die ganzheitliche Kompetenz unseres Teams und schnelle Kommunikationswege sind die Basis für eine reibungslose und flexible Zusammenarbeit mit unseren Kunden. Dieses Arbeiten hat uns zu einem verlässlichen und geschätzten Partner für die verschiedensten Kundengruppen in Europa und Übersee gemacht. Alle Mitarbeiter beteiligen sich an der stetigen Optimierung unserer Leistungen. Gemeinsam schaffen wir Ergebnisse, welche die Kundenerwartungen übertreffen.

Name: Merwede Springs
Description:
Merwede Springs is een toonaangevende Europese verenfabrikant met passie voor kwaliteit en innovatie. Onze geschiedenis gaat terug naar 1954, na jarenlange ervaring te hebben opgedaan in het maken en ontwikkelen van technische veren heeft de heer W. van den Heuvel Merwede Springs opgericht. In 2002 heeft de heer W.J. van den Heuvel (3e generatie) het familiebedrijf overgenomen. 

Vanaf 1954 hebben we ons gecommitteerd aan het leveren van hoogwaardige veren die voldoen aan de strenge normen van de industrie. We hebben een modern machinepark en een getalenteerd team van professionals die zich inzetten voor onze klanten. Door het bundelen van de krachten van drie verenfabrieken en een handelsonderneming kunnen wij als Merwede Springs een compleet scala aan auto-, motor-, en industriële veren produceren en leveren. Hierdoor zijn de mogelijkheden voor het verwaardigen van hoogwaardige en kwalitatieve band- en draadproducten nagenoeg onbeperkt.

Vanaf het begin van de jaren ’80 produceert Merwede Springs verlagingsveren en heeft een zeer uitgebreid assortiment opgebouwd met voor bijna elk automodel een passend set. Deze sets worden in ons eigen ontwikkelcentrum ontwikkeld en vervolgens in de fabriek geproduceerd. Een unieke combinatie omdat het gehele proces van ontwikkeling tot eindresultaat onder één dak plaats vindt. Ook leveren wij wereldwijd aan vele specialisten op het gebied van schokbrekers/vering binnen de after-market voor motoren.

Name: Spring Beds
Description:
There are several good reasons to shop with us. We have worked hard to offer our UK customers products that satisfy every bedroom furniture need without substantial price tags. Buying a necessary furniture item should not keep you awake at night while you worry if you can afford it.
We strive to offer top-notch customer service, and if your ordered item is not as you anticipated, we will replace it or refund the sale, no questions asked.
If you have any questions, call us 07874359226 or use the contact form. Our friendly customer service reps are always on hand to help.

Name: Mollificio Ciullo S.r.l.
Description: Production of springs and bent parts

Name: Garda molle S.R.L.
Description: Garda Molle is a company specialising in designing and producing springs and wire components. We offer our customers high-quality, reliable springs. Every stage of the process is taken care of to enhance and support the application of each element in the best possible way. We constantly invest in upgrading our machinery and in staff training.

Name: Officine SAI srl
Description:
Realizziamo stampi di diversi formati per la tranciatura e la piega di materiali metallici e per la formatura di particolari da uno spessore di 0.1mm fino a 15 mm. Il nostro parco macchine è dotato di stazioni CAD-CAM, macchinari tradizionali e CNC e un laboratorio di test qualità interno.
Per quanto riguarda il settore AUTOMOTIVE realizziamo PISTON CLIPS e altri accessori per sistema frenante auto, MOLLE e ACCESSORI per il sistema frenante dei veicoli industriali, FILTRI per veicoli industriali. 
Realizziamo poi MINUTERIE METALLICHE (principalmente in materiali ferrosi) temprate o/e rivestite che spaziano dalla CONTATTERIA alle MOLLE e a PRODOTTI COMPLESSI assemblati durante la produzione in continuo.
Ci occupiamo anche di PRODOTTI E COMPONENTI DI EDILIZIA a disegno per diversi utilizzi come ACCESSORI PER CARIOLE o RUOTE. 
Infine realizziamo GHIERE in acciao inox o in ferro e FREGI per il settore CASALINGO.

L'attenzione alle esigenze del cliente è il fulcro del ciclo produtivo di SAI, da sempre attenta alle fasi di ricerca e sviluppo e di aggiornamento del parco macchine, per poter offrire soluzioni sempre più evolute per tutti i settori di applicazione.

Name: WWD KCIUK SP.K.
Description: We have been operating on the market for over 35 years. During this time, we transformed from a small plant producing chain link fence into a large commercial and production company with a wide range of activities. We manufacture springs, bent wire elements, varnish hangers and products necessary to construct structures for orchards and vineyards. We have also been a trading company for several years, and we have has several hundred types of wire on offer.

Name: Ferrari Reti Srl
Description:
Ferrari Reti è un punto di riferimento nel Nord Italia per la lavorazione del filo in ferro e in acciaio inox così come per la produzione di reti metalliche elettrosaldate. Name: #Robo Connect
Description:
ROBO CONNECT
Banking on our enriched industry experience ROBO CONNECT believes in innovations of forming of wires and tubes.
It works at the basic level technique of wire forming as well as ready to accept the challenges of changing needs of the industry. Our major focus is on keeping up with the human imagination and perpetual search for lower costs from increased speeds, shorter part setups and change over time with larger production ranges. Stability and extreme bending freedom including butt welding, threading, piercing, punching, chamfring, swaging with advanced technology is our main motto. We specialised in CNC multiple head machines that are used in latest servo technology and motion controls. We use high-performance computers for Man-Machine - Interfaces and machine controls which are equipped with easy to use software programs for product design, machine setup, operation, and data collection. We strive to provide machines that are equipped with remote diagnosis via a telephone line or Internet connection or even made ready for video conferences at the MMI.
With the help of dexterous team members, we work on machines that you will require depends on the applications.

How complex is the part?
How many will be made in a batch?
How many different parts will be made on the machine?
How precisely does the part need to be?
Answer to these questions will guide us to the type of machines that are best suited for you.
ROBO CONNECT expertise in these aspects of wire forming and always ready to improve and expand it to higher levels.
Machines with servo bending positions.
Real-time simulation and rendering.
Higher production combined with lower prices.
Wire and tube forming on the same machine.
Built-in QC devices to find optimum bend speeds.
Multiple line forming.
Online diagnosis system.
Colour touch screen for setup and operation.
Positive and negative bends simultaneously.
Fast tool changes.
Increased bending rate -thousand of Deg/Sec.
Heavy use of servo Drives.

Nous comptons plus de 30 spécialistes des ressorts à travers le monde. Nos installations de production et de distribution modernes se trouvent aux Pays-Bas, en République tchèque, en Allemagne, en Pologne, en Roumanie, en France, en Espagne et en Inde. Alcomex vise l'excellence en matière de satisfaction client, de solutions personnalisées, de qualité de production et de qualité globale. Nos activités quotidiennes reflètent cet engagement. Grâce à notre expertise technique, à nos installations d'essai avancées et à nos capacités de prototypage, Alcomex offre une expérience sans précédent dans le domaine des ressorts techniques.

Nous accordons une grande importance à la communication, au rapport qualité-prix et à la livraison rapide pour nos clients. Si vous êtes curieux de découvrir notre gamme de produits, consultez notre catalogue de ressorts standards : https://www.alcomex.fr/ressorts-standards/

Si vous avez un défi à relever pour lequel nous pouvons vous aider, notre équipe d'ingénieurs est disponible. Travaillons ensemble pour trouver la solution adaptée. https://www.alcomex.fr/contact-2/

     • technische Beratung

     • Handmuster

     • Serienfertigung



Im eigenen Werkzeugbau fertigen wir Präzisions- werkzeuge für Stanz-, Schneid-, Biege- und Ziehteile aus Stahl, Nirosta, Alu und weiteren NE-Metallen von 0,1 bis 5 mm Werkstoffdicke.



Wir bei KREUTZER denken bis zum Ende. 
Für Sie, unseren Kunden. 
Jeden Tag von neuem und jeden Tag mit ein bisschen mehr Erfahrung. 
Das ist nun seit mehr als 42 Jahren so. Denn wir verbiegen nicht nur Metall - wir lösen auch Ihre Probleme.

Wir begleiten Sie von der Entwurfsskizze bis zum fertigen Produkt in Serie. 
Egal, ob es sich um ein einfaches Stanzteil oder eine komplexe Baugruppe handelt - wir werden das optimale Ergebnis für Sie erzielen, da wir alle wichtigen Schritte selbst ausführen: Entwurf, Werkzeugkonstruktion und -bau, sowie die Fertigung.

Dabei ist Qualität für uns keine lästige Pflicht, sondern der Weg zum Ziel.

The company's Manufacturing Unit-II was commissioned in Haridwar, in March-2010, to cater to fast growing automotive Industry in the state of Uttarakhand.
 
The Company established the state of art Retractor Springs manufacturing plant (Seat Belt & allied applications) at Manesar in 2010, in the name of MM Asan Auto Ltd., with technical know how from South Korea.

Prestigious International System Certifications for design & manufacturing of Metallic Coil Springs : ISO-9001-2008 & ISO/TS-16949-2009.

MM AUTO is a Learning Organization, always ready for change to adopt the latest in technology and management systems. - Apresentação

Esta nova empreitada permitiu ao proprietário almejar, num exercício visionário, ao fim da crise a liderança no cenário mineiro na fabricação de molas industriais, uma nobre missão. Em sua sede a MAXMOLAS MUNDIAL EIRELI conta com infraestrutura adequada, á altura de suas expectativas de crescimento no mercado e utilizando técnicas e maquinário de alta produtividade bem como lançando mão como de costume em sua trajetória, de práticas de parceria permanente e profícua com seus clientes, respeitando sempre seus requisitos e demais expectativas quanto ao produto.
Valores como transparência, profissionalismo e ética nos relacionamentos comerciais que sempre nos ajudaram a tornar-se referência em seu segmento. Agilidade, dinamismo e integração com seus clientes, são qualidades que as Fábricas Molas Mundial e MAXMOLAS MUNDIAL farão sempre questão de imprimir em seus negócios
Fabricamos qualquer quantidade mediante amostra, desenho ou medidas.

I trattamenti superficiali sono affidati a ditte esterne che collaborano da anni che la Fimeco. Per il trattamento di cromatura, abbiamo selezionato tre diverse galvaniche che che ci garantiscono affidabilità e qualità.

I principali clienti della Fimeco s.r.l. sono le grandi ditte produttrici di elettrodomestici quali BSH, Whirlpool, Indesit Company.

Name: HeliSpring Works
Description:
HeliSpring Works is a trusted name in the Indian spring manufacturing industry, delivering precision-engineered spring solutions to clients across Delhi NCR and beyond. As a reliable spring manufacturer and wholesale supplier, we specialize in producing high-quality compression springs, tension springs, and custom spring assemblies for a wide variety of applications. Our extensive customer base spans key industrial areas like Faridabad, Ghaziabad, Noida, Gurugram, and Delhi, along with clients located throughout India.

With decades of manufacturing expertise and advanced production technologies, we ensure that each spring meets strict quality and dimensional standards. Our team designs and manufactures springs using premium materials like stainless steel (302, 304, 316), phosphor bronze, carbon steel, music wire, and brass to ensure long-lasting performance, corrosion resistance, and durability. Whether it’s a small batch for a specialized application or a bulk order for OEM production, we have the capacity and experience to meet your needs.

As a dedicated wholesale spring supplier, we support high-volume production runs for industries such as electronics, automotive, medical devices, electrical equipment, and consumer goods. Our facility is optimized for just-in-time manufacturing and large-scale distribution, ensuring that clients receive their orders on schedule without compromising on quality. From small compression springs used in battery holders and relays to tension springs in mechanical locks and industrial tools, we deliver reliable, tailor-made spring solutions for every use case.

Our commitment to excellence, responsive customer service, and deep industry knowledge make us the preferred spring manufacturer for businesses throughout Faridabad, Ghaziabad, Delhi NCR, and across India. If you’re looking for a trustworthy partner for your custom or bulk spring requirements, HeliSpring Works is ready to deliver with precision, consistency, and speed.

Name: RD Flex
Description:
Com mais de 40 anos de experiência, atuamos no mercado da indústria mecânica, indústria metalúrgica, eletrodomésticos, eletrônica, eletroeletrônica e autopeças.Desenvolvemos projetos que vão desde uma simples correção de produto até a nacionalização plena de molas, trava, presilhas etc.Somos uma empresa totalmente voltada para a modernização, buscando sempre a redução de custos para oferecermos aos nossos clientes a melhor qualidade de acordo com suas necessidades específicas.

MISSÃO

Nossa missão é ser artesãos da modernidade, esculpindo soluções que não apenas atendem, mas transcendem as expectativas de nossos clientes. Empenhamo-nos em ser a ponte para um futuro onde a eficiência e a qualidade caminham lado a lado, enriquecendo cada projeto com soluções sob medida, desenhadas especificamente para as necessidades únicas de cada cliente.

VALORES

Inovação Contínua: A busca incessante pela inovação está no cerne de tudo que fazemos, permitindo-nos enfrentar desafios e superar expectativas.
Excelência e Precisão: Comprometemo-nos com a excelência em cada detalhe, garantindo a precisão que nossos clientes merecem.
Sustentabilidade e Eficiência: A modernização não apenas nos guia para o futuro; ela nos ensina a importância da sustentabilidade e da eficiência, fundamentais para a redução de custos e para a oferta de soluções de qualidade superior.
Parceria e Confiança: Valorizamos as relações duradouras com nossos clientes, baseadas na confiança mútua e no comprometimento com resultados que falam por si.
Somos uma orquestra em constante evolução, dedicada a harmonizar a modernização com a redução de custos, sempre com o foco de oferecer aos nossos clientes a mais alta qualidade, de acordo com suas necessidades específicas. 

Cotações : comercial@rdflex.com.br

Name: CHAPLINWIRE
Description: Chaplin Wire is the UK’s leading manufacturer of precision round and shaped wires, supplying a wide range of industries around the world.
