Name: C.M.Z. S.r.l. Costruzione Molle Zagato
Description:
La storia dell’azienda, nasce con il Sig. Zagato Pietro, che dopo una lunga esperienza nel campo delle molle, decide, dopo aver lavorato per lungo tempo in società di mettersi in proprio.

Così nel 1972 inizia la sua attività come artigiano,  intanto inizia a fare la sua presenza anche il figlio Marco che ogni giorno dopo la scuola aiuta il padre nel lavoro, iniziando ad acquisire esperienza.



Nel 1977 padre e figlio costituiscono una società, dopo quattro anni il padre, Zagato Pietro decide di lasciare le redini dell’azienda al figlio Marco, che quindi costituisce la ditta individuale Mollificio M.Z. Zagato.

Il padre Pietro, rimarrà in azienda ancora qualche anno per dispensare consigli utili sulla produzione delle molle.

Inizialmente l’attività ha avuto le sue sedi a Torino, dal 2007 la ditta si è traferita in provincia, a San Giorgio Canavese, comoda da raggiungere avendo vicino l’autostrada Torino-Aosta con uscita al casello di San Giorgio.

Nel 2007 si continua con la tradizione, e dopo aver conseguito il diploma di perito meccanico, fa il suo ingresso in azienda il figlio Michael, e anche lui seguendo le orme del nonno, e del papà inizia a lavorare a pieno regime nell’azienda cercando di migliorare la qualità nelle lavorazioni,  portando anche una ventata di spirito innovativo, volto al perfezionamento di alcune lavorazioni, qualche anno più tardi si aggiunge anche l’altro figlio Jordi a completare la forza lavorativa, proseguendo la tradizione, con l’intento di portare idee sempre nuove, sviluppandole anche in altri campi e altri mercati.
Nel 2018, avviene un altro passaggio generazionale e si costituisce la C.M.Z SRL, da quel lontano 1972 ne è passato di tempo, e di strada ne è stata fatta, il nostro obiettivo è quello di poter continuare a soddisfare le esigenze dei nostri clienti, lavorando sempre con passione, precisione e qualità, avendo a cuore il made in Italy.

Name: Maroc Soudage Industry
Description:
Maroc Soudage Industry, un leader dans la production et la distribution de matériel de soudage, de métaux d'apports et d'accessoires de grandes marques.
vous êtes peut-être à la recherche de solutions pour vos besoins en matière de soudage, et nous aimerions vous proposer nos services.
Chez Maroc Soudage Industry, nous sommes fiers de notre expertise et de notre savoir-faire en matière de soudage.
Nous vous offrons une large gamme de produits de haute qualité, y compris des fils de soudage pour le soudage MIG d'aciers au carbone, des consommables, des accessoires et bien plus encore.
Nos produits sont à la pointe de la technologie et vous permettent de réaliser des soudures de qualité supérieure.
En outre, nous proposons également des services de conseil et de support technique pour vous aider à choisir les produits les plus adaptés à vos besoins et à résoudre tout problème que vous pourriez rencontrer avec votre équipement.
Nous sommes là pour vous aider à réussir dans votre projet de soudage, quelle que soit sa complexité.
Si vous êtes intéressé par nos produits et services, n'hésitez pas à nous contacter pour plus d'informations ou pour organiser une visite de notre usine.

Name: Hamburger Drahtseilerei A. Steppuhn GmbH
Description:
Hamburger Drahtseilerei - a success story since 1945

Founded in the vibrant cosmopolitan city of Hamburg and relocated to Bad Oldesloe in 1954, Hamburger Drahtseilerei has developed into a globally successful producer and development partner for our customers. With a continuously expanded and extended machine park for wire rope production and our investments in new technologies, such as extrusion technology in 1973, we offer individual solutions for steel wire ropes and plastic extrusion. Thanks to our many years of manufacturing experience and our extensive know-how, we are your reliable partner for competent and individual solutions.
Put your trust in Hamburger Drahtseilerei - we make sure that your projects stay on track.

Name: Spiralflex S.r.l.
Description:
Spiralflex nasce nel 1975 come azienda produttrice di conduits per i settori del ciclo e motociclo e dell'agricoltura.
L'azienda, sempre particolarmente attenta alle esigenze di mercato, si è progressivamente e costantemente evoluta specializzandosi in diversi settori industriali grazie alla realizzazione di nuovi impianti atti a conseguire una maggiore efficienza produttiva ed una precisa e sicura risposta alle richieste del mercato stesso.
Oggi l’azienda produce e commercia spirali, funi e minuterie per il settore industriale. In particolare, guaine laminate in acciaio, tonde, con tubetto, speciali e in spezzoni per torce saldatrici.
Una lucida filosofia ed una solida disciplina impongono all'azienda una continua innovazione tecnologica permettendo il raggiungimento di ottimi standard qualitativi che, assieme alla quarantennale esperienza nel settore, ne fanno un sicuro punto di riferimento per ogni esigenza tecnica specifica.

Name: YAYKURSAN OTOMATİK YAY SİSTEMLERİ
Description:
Kurtul Şahin tarafından 1973 yılında 25 m2’lik alana sahip bir atölyede yay imalatı yapmak üzere faaliyete geçmiştir.
1994 yılı sonuna kadar çeşitli aşamalardan geçtikten sonra; özellikle otomotiv ana ve yan sanayisine daha kaliteli hizmet sunmak üzere 1995 yılı Başından itibaren çalı bölgesindeki fabrika binasında taşınılmıştır. Ardından 2011 Nisan ayından itibaren NOSAB bölgesine geçiş yapılarak yüksek kapasite ile üretimine başlamıştır. OEM olarak TOFAŞ ve KARSAN firmalarına üretim yapmaktadır. Diğer müşterilerimiz ise Tier1 ve Tier2 firmalarıdır.
Yaykursan IATF 16949 kalite sitem belgesine sahiptir.

Name: HYBRID TITANIUM
Description: Since 30 years we are partners of CNR (National Research Council) with which we continue to develop new products with our HYBRID TITANIUM. Provide our customers with the best product ever, this is what drives us to constantly strive towards improvement. We are aware that it is a difficult challenge, however passion, determination and perseverance have allowed us to overcome impossible challenges and reach goals that might have seemed unattainable. Our experience is the result of 30 years of research and development. It all began with a small family business, where the passion for creating solutions with shape memory alloys has led us to develop a deep knowledge of the material being processed. The brands that have accompanied us during these years are among the best known in the fashion market, we have had the honor and the pleasure of producing for big names, which have allowed us to grow and transform ourselves from the initial family business to a structured and constantly growing company. The aerospace world has played a key role in our development process. The responsibility, that our products would be used in space, was the driving force that allowed us to take a major leap towards the development of exclusive and one of a kind products. Another fundamental element is represented by the National Research Council, a technological partner that has always accompanied us, and still stands by our side, with the task of contributing to research and validating our progress. The vision for the future has always been very clear for us: faithful to our mission, we are projected towards constant development that allows us to support the main players in the jewellery, eyewear, footwear and fashion accessories sectors. We intend to establish ourselves and become the consolidated strategic partner of those who today are already in the spotlight on the big stages, giving pride of place behind the scenes to be the “soul” of a constantly growing success.

Name: ATTREZZERIA UMF SRL
Description:
ATTREZZERIA UMF è presente sul mercato da oltre 40 anni nella lavorazione di tranciatura di metalli, deformazione a freddo della lamiera e costruzione di stampi trancia e termoplastici.

L’azienda opera nei seguenti settori:

     ELETTROMECCANICO – produzione di armature per bobine e faston;
    AUTOMOBILISTICO – produzione di componenti per fanali e accessori;
     ELETTRONICO – produzione di molle speciali per la misurazione di temperatura e clips;
      COSMETICO - packaging cosmetico

Obiettivo
Soddisfare le aspettative dei nostri clienti fornendo prodotti di alta qualità grazie all'utilizzo di attrezzature e macchinari tecnologicamente all'avanguardia.

Nata dapprima come attrezzeria, per la progettazione e costruzione stampi per tranciatura e deformazione a freddo della lamiera, ha creato al proprio interno un reparto di tranceria per lo stampaggio di articoli in lamiera, progressivamente incrementato, che a tutt’oggi conta 12 presse con vari tonnellaggi. 

L’attività si svolge in due unità produttive adiacenti, su una superficie complessiva di 5.000 mq.

Il personale tecnico è in grado di fornire al cliente un supporto tecnico e soluzioni adeguate per industrializzare il prodotto.

Si avvale di un parco macchine all’avanguardia nel reparto attrezzeria, macchine che vengono anche impiegate nella lavorazione CNC conto terzi.

Il reparto tranceria conta 12 presse che vanno da 25 tonnellate a 200 tonnellate.

Name: Gardner Spring, Inc.
Description:
For more than a century, Gardner Spring, Inc. has been a trusted American manufacturer of high-quality stock springs. Founded in 1907 and located in Tulsa, Gardner Spring has grown from a regional supplier into a nationally recognized source for dependable spring solutions.

Today, our products support a wide range of industries, including aerospace, medical, automotive, and consumer goods, while our retail assortments continue to serve DIY customers across the country. As a proud woman-established business, Gardner Spring blends long-standing manufacturing expertise with a commitment to consistency, service, and craftsmanship.

Built on tradition and focused on the future, we deliver spring solutions that have earned trust for generations—and continue to perform where it matters most.

We also offer custom design services of special electrical contacts for customers, in order to create specific products for every need, providing technical assistance and after-sales support.

Name: AGRO Steel Wire GmbH
Description:
Die AGRO Steel Wire steht seit über 20 Jahren für höchste Qualität und umweltschonende und ressourcenschonende Produktionsverfahren mit dem Ziel, nachhaltig gute Drähte zu produzieren. In den Produktionsstandorten in Bad Essen bei Osnabrück und Szamotuly in Polen produzieren die Drahtziehereien patentiert gezogene unlegierte Federstahldrähte in verschiedensten Ausführungen – ob verkupfert oder phosphatiert, für jede Anforderung wird die passende Lösung angeboten. Ein hochmoderner und energieeffizienter Maschinenpark, ausgezeichnetes Rohmaterial und Fachkenntnis sind dabei beste Voraussetzungen für hochwertige Endprodukte. Chargenreine Produktion, durchgängige Qualitätskontrolle und lückenlose Transparenz, die die Rückverfolgbarkeit bis zum Walzdraht ermöglicht, sind die Erfolgsfaktoren. Die AGRO Steel Wire ist ein Teil der international erfolgreichen AGRO Gruppe, einem Unternehmensverbund, der mit der Marke AGRO seit über 75 Jahren für die Entwicklung und Produktion von qualitativ hochwertigen Federkernen für die Matratzen- und Polstermöbelindustrie, die Herstellung von Spinnvlies sowie der Konstruktion und Fertigung von Maschinen, Ersatz- und Verschleißteilen steht. Mit dem Qualitätsanspruch „Made in Germany“ werden in den hoch technologisierten und automatisierten Fertigungsstandorten in Deutschland, Polen, Spanien, Portugal und USA vielfältige Produktlösungen für die unterschiedlichsten Anforderungen und Branchen produziert.

Serra Spring is a respected distributor in the United States specializing in custom springs manufactured in Switzerland. Through our partnership with Federnfabrik Schmid, we provide custom spring products, wire forming, and manufacturing solutions to a wide range of industries. Our sister company in Switzerland boasts over a century of experience in spring manufacturing, and we are proud to represent them as a leading supplier of mechanical springs, wire forms, stampings, bent parts, and light assemblies in both North American and international markets.

At Serra Spring, we maintain a competitive edge in the distribution of various spring-related products, including coiled springs, flat forms, clips, and specialized assemblies for clients in the automotive and non-automotive sectors.

Prototypes are a specialty of our production team in Switzerland, who work closely with customers to develop prototype parts. With advanced tooling capabilities, they are well-equipped to design and manufacture virtually any part to our customers' exact specifications.

From concept to development and through to validation testing and high-volume production, Serra Spring is committed to meeting a diverse range of needs for springs, wire and flat forming, as well as metal stampings.

Name: bedra, Inc.
Description:

Year after year, our plants produce more than 30 million kilometers of precision wire and rods – in over 100 alloy versions.
Added value for our customers. This is the yardstick for all our successes. As early as 1889, company founder Carl Berkenhoff, with his „fine wire drawing facility“ in Herborn-Merkenbach, Germany, was characterized by a central idea: to offer his customers more than others offer. Over the company‘s more than 135-year history, this understanding of customer proximity and orientation has grown into an enduring constant.
Today our products and services are represented in over 50 countries. Customers worldwide value bedra as a reliable partner for sustainable solutions in the fields of innovative high-tech precision wires for spark erosion, welding and brazing technology, electronic components, and special applications. Our high-performance alloys are also supplied as rods and bars for multiple industrial applications.
intelligent wires. Made by bedra. This is our quality promise. We operate in all the important areas of the world. We are one of the few global manufacturers of precision wires and alloys that represents the entire production chain: Casting, rolling, drawing, annealing, and electroplating. Our customers benefit from our depth of in-house production through 100% traceability, consistent high quality, and the highest possible processing reliability.

Name: RDK - Indústria e Comércio de Molas e Peças Estampadas
Description:
RDK - Indústria e Comércio de Molas e Peças Estampadas

Mais de 25 anos de competência em tecnologia da transformação arames e fitas, demonstram nosso sucesso e crescimento contínuos.

O nome RDK Molas é sinônimo de soluções inovadoras na técnica de molas, estampagem, dobragem e montagem de subconjuntos para nossos clientes. 

Clientes nacionais e internacionais dos ramos: aeroespacial, agrícola, automotivo, elétrico, eletrônico, ferroviário linha branca, linha marrom; encontram na RDK Molas e Peças Estampadas a tecnologia ao mais alto nível. 
meta
Parcerias estratégicas com clientes e fornecedores tornam a RDK Molas um fornecedor líder no ramo da transformação de arames e fitas.

Name: KERN LIEBERS
Description:
Kern Liebers Ltd is a UK based manufacturer of constant force springs, power springs and assemblies that incorporate these springs. We have been a competent partner in the development and manufacture of mass-produced custom spring solutions since 1977. 

Thanks to the size of our company, continuous technological development and the close partnerships we hold with our customers, we have not only the experience but also the skills to offer everything from design to mass production from a single source.

We have a catalogue range of standard springs and assemblies, additionally we offer bespoke springs for your individual needs. Our expertise and success is built from over 45 years of experience and our highly motivated team.

During 2008 we acquired Spiroflex and incorporated their existing product range into our operations at our Gainsborough facility, this allows us to offer our customers an extensive offering.

We are proud to supply a wide range of sectors not only in the UK but around the globe so let us be your trusted spring supplier!

As a subsidiary of the Kern Liebers group of companies, we can fall back on a global network to offer a wide range of spring capabilities. Kern Liebers was founded in 1888, their head office is based in southwest Germany but has over 40 locations around the world, employing over 7,000 professionals.

Name: Ningbo Mingpin Metal-Spring Steel Wire Manufacturer in China
Description:
Hello, this is Ningbo Mingpin Metal, your material partner for spring manufacture in China. After 15 years of development, the company has grown in size and strength. Ningbo Mingpin Metal has become China's leading manufacturer of stainless & high carbon steel spring wire.

Our company specializes in drawing of stainless steel wire from 0.15mm~5.0mm, Our annual production capability is more than 10000T, It is an ideal material for various spring manufacturing industries. With advanced management concepts and continuous improvement of management methods, we are striving for excellent product quality, continuous improvement, providing customers with technical solutions and making firm progress towards peer benchmarking companies.

Ningbo Mingpin Metal is specialized in stainless steel wire and carbon steel wire for spring. We offer value to our customers based on strong and sustainable relationships with steel mills, capability in heat treatment, surface treatment, wire drawing, also professional service of spring manufacture.

Our advantage products: 
MP ASTM A313 302-304-316 Spring Wire
MP ASTM A313 631 Stainless Steel Spring Wire
MP ASTM A313 Duplex Stainlss Steel Spring Wire
MP EN 10270-1 Spring Wire
MP EN 10270-3 SS Spring Wire
MP JIS G3521 High Carbon Wire
MP JIS G4314 SS Spring Wire
MP Piano Wire
MP Stainless Steel Redraw Wire

Name: PPHU SPRĘŻYNY Tomasz Stróżyk
Description:
PPHU SPRĘŻYNY Tomasz Stróżyk to nowoczesna, działająca na rynku od blisko 15 lat i będąca bezpośrednim kontynuatorem tradycji rodzinnych Firma. Przedmiotem jej działalności jest produkcja sprężyn oraz różnego rodzaju elementów z drutu.

Stosowana przez nas technologia jest przyjazna dla środowiska. Po przeniesieniu w 2016 roku firmy do nowej siedziby i po zaistniałych zmianach organizacyjnych firma wzmacnia swoją pozycję już nie tylko na rynku krajowym, ale również europejskim. Celem firmy jest utrzymanie wysokiej jakości produkowanych wyrobów przy jednoczesnym respektowaniu zasad ochrony środowiska.
Wdrożenie Zintegrowanego Systemu Zarządzania zgodnego z wymaganiami norm EN ISO 9001:2008 i EN ISO 14001:2004 oraz ciągłe doskonalenie jego skuteczności ma na celu wzrost i utrzymanie zaufania klientów oraz wzrost konkurencyjności, co pozwoli nam na umocnienie pozycji firmy na rynku. Wszystkie decyzje podejmowane w trakcie działalności firmy uwzględniają aspekty środowiskowe, w tym zapobieganie zanieczyszczeniom. Przestrzeganie wymagań wynikających z przepisów prawnych dotyczących ochrony środowiska traktujemy priorytetowo.
Politykę ZSZ w naszej firmie zamierzamy realizować poprzez następujące cele strategiczne:
rozwój rozwiązań technicznych i technologicznych w zakresie produkcji i kontroli jakości produkowanych sprężyn,
właściwą gospodarkę odpadami i ograniczanie ilości wykorzystywanych zasobów naturalnych,
systematyczne zwiększanie asortymentu oferowanych produktów, dostosowując się do oczekiwań Klientów
systematyczne podnoszenie świadomości pracowników w zakresie jakości wytwarzanych wyrobów oraz wymagań środowiskowych.
Przesłanie wynikające z założonych celów wymaga stałego zaangażowania wszystkich pracowników firmy w rozwój Zintegrowanego Systemu Zarządzania. Deklarujemy, iż stale będziemy monitorować adekwatność naszej polityki ZSZ. W imieniu wszystkich pracowników i swoim zobowiązuję się do aktywnego działania na rzecz utrzymania i doskonalenia skuteczności ZSZ.

Name: H&R Spezialfedern GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
The company headquarters of H&R Spezialfedern GmbH & Co KG in Lennestadt combines engineering, road testing, production and surface technology under one roof. Exclusively MADE IN GERMANY, H&R produces one of the world's largest ranges of sporty suspension components for road-legal vehicles. This includes lowering springs, height adjustable springs, lift springs, coil over suspensions, complete suspensions, sport stabilisers/ anti-roll bars and wheel spacers, always with the necessary homologation paperwork. H&R manufactures suspension components for special series for various well-known car manufacturers.

The H&R motorsport programme offers an extensive range of racing springs in standard diameters, lengths and spring rates made from high-strength special spring steel, which are used in the same specification in the DTM and many other racing series. With PULS, the Performance Ultra Light Springs, a further series has recently become available which significantly reduces the unsprung masses with a particularly low weight thanks to the use of a highly tempered special steel. 

H&R products are sold in over 60 countries worldwide, and H&R also has subsidiaries in the USA and Great Britain.

In addition to the production of suspension components, H&R is recognised as an innovative manufacturer of technical springs for a wide range of applications. The portfolio includes compression and tension springs, leg and flat moulded springs, bent wire parts and vehicle springs as well as shock absorbers for vehicles and industrial applications of all kinds.

H&R is certified for the development, production and trade of surgical medical products with its own QM system in accordance with the DIN ISO 13485:2012 standard. This also includes the production of technical springs for use in medical devices.

https://www.h-r.com/en/company/

Name: COLOMBI MOLLIFICIO S.p.A.
Description:
Colombi Mollificio S.p.A., fondata nel 1952, progetta e produce molle e componenti elastici per applicazioni industriali e automotive, offrendo soluzioni su misura che coniugano competenza ingegneristica, controllo qualità rigoroso e produzione interamente italiana. La nostra esperienza nei processi produttivi e l’attenzione alla relazione con il cliente ci permettono di realizzare componenti affidabili, performanti e conformi alle specifiche più esigenti.

Il Sistema Qualità di Colombi Mollificio S.p.A è stato certificato, tra i primissimi in Italia, nel 1993, secondo la norma ISO 9002 e successivamente aggiornato alla norma ISO 9001:2008, oltre alle certificazioni ISO 14001 e IATF 16949.

Per informazioni e candidature: canidature@colombimollificio.com

Name: MESCO Springs - Modern Engineering and Spring Company
Description:
MESCO Springs is a leading manufacturer of high-quality springs, wire forms, and metal pressings, based in India. With 55+ years of expertise, we have earned a reputation for delivering reliable, high-performance components across diverse industries such as Elevators, Construction & Mining Equipment, Vibro-Feeders & Vibrating Screens, Control Valves, Safety Valves, Actuators, Medium Voltage and High Voltage Circuit Breakers, Anti Vibration Mounts, Playground Equipment's and many more.

Our product range includes compression springs, tension springs, torsion springs, wire forms, and custom-designed solutions tailored to meet specific customer needs. Equipped with advanced production facilities and a skilled engineering team, we ensure the highest quality standards, precise tolerances, and consistent performance in every product.

Beyond springs, MESCO Springs also specializes in metal pressings, including clips, clamps, brackets, and other components, all crafted with meticulous attention to detail and stringent quality control processes.

We are dedicated to providing exceptional customer service, working closely with our clients to understand their unique requirements. Our experienced engineers offer technical advice and support, ensuring that customers select the ideal components for their applications.

As a trusted partner in the industry, MESCO Springs continues to deliver reliable, high-performance solutions to customers worldwide.

Name: DMW - Drahtmaschenweberei GmbH
Description:
Seit über 90 Jahren steht die DMW - Drahtmaschenweberei GmbH (früher: Draht Müller Wellengitter GmbH) für Qualität, Präzision und Innovation in der Verarbeitung von Draht. Als Spezialist für Wellengitter, Drahtgewebe und Sonderanfertigungen entwickeln wir langlebige Lösungen – von der Planung bis zur Fertigstellung, individuell auf jeden Einsatzbereich abgestimmt.

Unsere Produkte sind in zahlreichen Branchen zuhause: in der Sieb- und Fördertechnik, im Zaun- und Sicherheitsbau, in Belüftungs- und Regalsystemen, bei Maschineneinhausungen oder in der Landschaftsgestaltung. Immer dort, wo Stabilität, Funktion und Design zusammentreffen, kommen unsere Gitter zum Einsatz.

Mit modernen Maschinen, zertifizierten Prozessen und einem Team, das Draht versteht, fertigen wir „Made in Germany“ – nach höchsten Standards in Qualität, Nachhaltigkeit und Effizienz. Ob Edelstahl, Aluminium, Kupfer oder verzinkter Draht: Wir verarbeiten nur geprüfte Materialien führender Lieferanten.

Neben klassischen Wellengittern entstehen bei uns auch innovative Aluminium-Systemlösungen, etwa für den Brandschutz in Hochregallagern oder kommunale Anwendungen. Diese Eigenentwicklungen verbinden Sicherheit, Wirtschaftlichkeit und Langlebigkeit – für Kunden, die mehr erwarten.

DMW steht für partnerschaftliche Zusammenarbeit, maßgeschneiderte Lösungen und ein tiefes Verständnis für Material, Technik und Anwendung.
Wir weben nicht nur Draht – wir verbinden Ideen, Erfahrung und Qualität zu Produkten, die überzeugen.

Name: Mollificio Mantovano Srl
Description:
We produce all types of wire and plate springs and small metal parts with cutting-edge tools and technologies, offering technical solutions for every kind of application.
Through a constant technological and managerial renewal, Mollificio Mantovano has become a solid reality in the sector, capable of offering innovative solutions for every kind of application in various industrial sectors: automotive, medical, household appliance, hydraulic, furniture, electrical, electronic, agricultural, food and sports.

We manufacture products on behalf of Italian, foreign and multinational companies of primary importance, and we supply companies that collaborate with prestigious brands of cars and motorcycles.
For this reason our processes and products are able to pass the audits of the most demanding customers; continuous checks are carried out for the UNI EN ISO 9001 certified quality since 1999, with tools such as 2D and 3D LEDs, durometers, torque transducers, micrometers etc.
Our technical department is able to support the customer in the development and design from the simplest to the most complex wire and strip details.

Constant and innovative investments allow us to be competitive by ensuring our customers total quality and production flexibility, thanks to machinery made by leading companies like Wafios, Simplex, Bhiler.
We are proud to guarantee complete control and traceability of the production process, from the incoming material to final compliance.

Name: Heinrich Stamm GmbH
Description:
The Heinrich Stamm GmbH was founded in the year 1815 as a brass wire drawing mill by Caspar Bernhard Stamm and is since then family owned. Since 2006 Heinrich Stamm GmbH belongs to the Bender family.

Today we offer our customers an extensive product program suitable for various applications. We offer high-grade stainless steel wires, EDM wires, as well as of non-ferrous metal wires. In the recent past we specialized in the production of fine and finest wires. 

Located in Iserlohn we are established as an independent and global operating wire drawing company and present ourself nowadays as an innovative enterprise in the region. With a clear confession to our homeland location we manufacture all our products exclusively „Made in Germany“.

Our product line includes wire straighteners, wedge grips, wire guides, tensile testing jaws, and magnetic brakes and clutches to be used in a variety of ferrous and nonferrous applications. We serve a wide range of industries involved in steel and metal wire fabrication including automotive and industrial tooling to high-precision medical equipment. Quality without compromise.

Name: Alcomex Federn GmbH
Description:
Die Alcomex Springs Group bietet ihren Kunden erstklassige Federlösungen. Als Marktführer für Garagentorfedern in Europa und anerkannter Spezialist für Industriefedern ist Alcomex eine angesehene Marke.

Wir bei Alcomex wissen, dass unsere technischen Federn einen unverzichtbaren Bestandteil der Produktanwendung, Installation oder des Produktionsprozesses unserer Kunden darstellen. Wir bieten Federn in verschiedenen Formen und Größen an und streben danach, die Erwartungen unserer Stakeholder zu übertreffen - was wir bei Alcomex als "Erwartungen übertreffen" bezeichnen.

Seit unserer Gründung 1992 setzen wir uns dafür ein, unseren Kunden intelligente technische Federlösungen anzubieten. Unsere Mission ist es, die Erwartungen von Mensch, Umwelt und Produkt zu übertreffen. Mit unserem "One-Stop-Shop"-Konzept unterstützen wir Sie von Anfang bis Ende.

Wir beschäftigen über 30 engagierte Federspezialisten weltweit und verfügen über moderne Produktionsstätten und Vertriebszentren in den Niederlanden, der Tschechischen Republik, Deutschland, Polen, Rumänien, Frankreich, Spanien und Indien. Bei Alcomex setzen wir Maßstäbe in Bezug auf Kundenzufriedenheit, kundenspezifische Federlösungen, hervorragende Produktionsqualität und herausragende Qualität. Unser technisches Know-how, unsere führenden Testeinrichtungen und unsere Möglichkeiten zur Herstellung von Prototypen ermöglichen es uns, Ihnen eine einzigartige Erfahrung im Bereich der technischen Federn zu bieten.

Wir legen Wert auf gute Kommunikation, ein gutes Preis-Leistungs-Verhältnis und schnelle Lieferung für unsere Kunden. Wenn Sie an unserem Produktangebot interessiert sind, werfen Sie einen Blick in unseren Katalog für Standardfedern: https://www.alcomex.de/standard-federn/.

Haben Sie eine Herausforderung, die wir bewältigen können? Unser Engineering-Team steht Ihnen jederzeit zur Verfügung. Gemeinsam entwickeln wir die richtige Lösung. Kontaktieren Sie uns unter https://www.alcomex.de/kontakt/

Name: Molag - Indústria de Molas Técnicas, Lda.
Description: A Molag é uma empresa portuguesa inserida na indústria transformadora, mais concretamente no setor da metalurgia e metalomecânica. Dedica-se ao fabrico de todo o tipo de artefatos em arame, com destaque para molas de tração, torção e compressão, assim como ganchos e argolas. Maioritariamente trabalha com arame de aço carbono Galvanizado, Fosfatado e Inox, entre outras matérias-primas. Conta com a sabedoria de colaboradores com décadas de experiência e as mais recentes técnicas, tecnologias e equipamento de produção, para proporcionar produtos com o mais elevado padrão de qualidade. Conquistou um lugar de destaque no seu ramo, trabalhando com indústria automóvel, agrícola, bélica, aeronáutica, assim como componentes de bicicletas, ferragens, fechaduras, serralharia e marroquinaria.

Description: Fonoon Sim Speed Company produces all kinds of pure and alloy wires. It has succeeded in producing fine and ultra-fine wires with special uses. As the need for all kinds of pure or alloy wires increased, the company expanded its production to a great variety of metals and diameters. At Fonoon Sim Speed Company, after production, each product is tested by relevant experts to meet your needs precisely. Fonoon Speed provides supply solutions for standard and non-standard material requests. Name: Alabama Wire, LLC
Description:
Alabama Wire is the one-stop source for all your wire and wire products needs. We offer straightened and cut wire in the broadest range of diameters and lengths in the industry. Materials include low carbon steel, galvanized steel, stainless steel, aluminum, and a variety of high carbon spring temper grades.

Coiled wire is available for immediate shipment from our on-site inventory. In addition, we have ready access to the inventory and production capability of most major wire drawers to meet your special requirements. 

Custom wireforms and fabricated wire products are available from our wireforming department. It has a full complement of conventional and CNC equipment to efficiently produce wireforms in most any lot size. We are known for our quality and quick turnaround. 

Our Nursery Products line covers the plant stabilization needs of the commercial nurseryman. Metal tree stakes provide support for the protection and proper growth of in-ground trees and shrubs. Container Hooks and our highly effective Container Stabilization Baskets protect your investment in container-based plants by preventing blow-over.

Name: Apit Wires
Description:
APIT is a Dubai-based general trading company specializing in the supply and export of Hot-Dip Galvanized Wire, Gargoor (traditional fishing traps), and marine-grade fishing wire. With a strong base in Business Bay, we serve clients across the UAE, GCC, and international markets, offering reliable products for the industrial, construction, and marine sectors.

Our mission is to provide high-quality materials at competitive prices, backed by responsive service and a deep understanding of market needs.

Hot-Dip Galvanized Steel Wire (various gauges & uses)

Name: C.I.M.A. SpA (Compagnia Italiana Molle Acciaio)
Description:
The Belfin Group is a global manufacturer of products for chassis and driveline technology, a pioneer in mechanically joined fastener technology, as well as the European leader for suspension system for washing machines. The group, which is 100% owned by Bellazzi family, was founded in 1946 as a spring manufacturer in Italy, and is now present in different locations worldwide from Europe to China and America. Our technologies are mostly dedicated to pressing and forming of steel wire and band, thus providing numerous products for both car and truck chassis and driveline. Nowadays our range of products comprises springs, special fasteners, hose clamps, rings and complex bellevilles together with a wide range of special products that we design and manufacture in cooperation with our automotive and white goods customers.
The group’s customers’ portfolio enumerates companies such as VW group, FCA group, ZF-TRW, Valeo, Magna and Gestamp, as well as Whirlpool group, BSH, Miele, Candy and Haier, all of which we supply worldwide under the scope of ISO TS quality system.

Name: De Santis Industrial Springs & Stampings Inc
Description:
hile we manufacture a wide range of springs, metal stampings, wire forming and specialty parts, there's nothing production line about our products or service. Parts are made-to-order. Service is superior, reliable and flexible. Customers get exactly what they want, when they need it!

DeSantis has the expertise, experience and state of the art equipment to assist in solving the problems encountered by design engineers and practical application. With our Spring Design Software and our industry knowledge we can be involved in development, prototyping and full production manufacturing. DeSantis has proven a reliable supplier to many industries including: Automotive. Lawn & Garden. Coating Industry. Appliance. Government. Military. Industrial Shock. Agricultural. Medical. And More!

Name: Federnwerke J.P. Grueber GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
The resulting creation of new and improved springs and bent parts puts new options for optimising products into the hands of engineers and designers. This allows GRUEBER customers to impress their end customers and get them excited about their products over the long term.

Quality since 1828.

For almost 200 years, iron has been forged and formed into high-quality products in the GRUEBER factory workshops. And the whole time, we have continuously worked on further developments in close cooperation with our customers. In the meantime, we have become a leading international partner for solutions in the development and production of springs and bent parts for a wide variety of applications and industries. Today, instead of using a hammer and anvil, our production takes place with highly advanced, state-of-the-art machinery as well as with experienced, intelligent and committed employees who breathe life into our unique quality standards.

Name: Gutekunst Federn
Description:
Gutekunst Federn specializes in the development and manufacture of Compression springs, Tension springs, Leg springs as well as bent wire parts from any desired Spring steel wire specialized.
In addition to the extensive Stock program with 12 603 spring sizes , manufactures Gutekunst Federn any desired individual metal spring up to 12 mm wire thickness in small quantities and large series. With 320 employees, the family company, founded in 1964, supplies around 100,000 customers from all industries worldwide. Certified according to ISO 9001 and 14001 Gutekunst Federn today counts five Branches in Germany and France one of the most famous spring manufacturers in Europe.

Name: Chicago Association of Spring Manufacturers, Inc. (CASMI)
Description:
CASMI was founded in 1944 as an independent, not-for-profit trade association dedicated to the development of good business practices, and sharing of technical information through ongoing communications among the job-shop spring manufacturers in the Greater Chicago area. While membership is predominantly located in Illinois, Indiana and Wisconsin, the organization provides support to spring manufacturer and supplier members throughout the United States.

Although CASMI works closely on several issues with the Spring Manufacturers Institute (SMI), a national organization, both organizations are independent of one another, with unique missions, programs, services, and members.

CASMI sponsors the SPRINGWORLD Trade Show every two years. New technology presented at this event brings thousands of people to the Chicago area from all over the world. Since the first show in 1959, SPRINGWORLD has become the largest gathering of the Spring Manufacturing and Wire Forming Industry anywhere at one time! Nearly 100 exhibiting companies - participating in 30,000+ net square feet of exhibit space - demonstrate machinery, show raw materials, test equipment, software and other products and services.

Name: Janaki Cable Industry Ltd
Description: Janaki Cable Industries, a trusted name in cable manufacturing, brings you cutting-edge solutions for house wiring, enamel wires, power cables, and overhead conductors with a commitment to excellence that drive progress.

Name: Bansal Wires Pvt. Ltd.
Description: Established in the year of 1985, Bansal Wires Private Limited is a leading manufacturer of Prestressed Concrete Wires & Strands , Mild Steel Wires and related wire products.

Name: Igecast Metalúrgica
Description:
Na cidade e no campo. No interior e no litoral. No serrado e no pantanal. A Igecast está presente protegendo o mais importante patrimônio do homem: sua família e sua propriedade. 

Há mais de 10 anos atuamos com inovação e tecnologia de ponta através de pesquisa e desenvolvimento de produtos na área de segurança perimetral.

Trouxemos para o Brasil os fios eletroplásticos Alumínio Premium. Um produto mais resistente, com proteção anticorrosiva e ideal para utilizar até em áreas de maresia.

Este pioneirismo comprova o compromisso da Igecast em ser uma empresa comprometida com o desenvolvimento da indústria brasileira.

Nossa missão é assegurar o bem estar e a tranquilidade do homem na cidade e no campo, através de soluções inovadoras em cercamento!

Wij verwerken volautomatisch:
- Drukveren en trekveren met een draaddikte van ø 0,2 mm t/m ø 12 mm.
- Torsieveren met een draaddikte van ø 0,5 mm t/m ø 12 mm.
- Draadproducten met een draaddikte van ø 0,5 mm t/m ø 16 mm.
- Bladveren met een dikte van 0,1 mm t/m 3 mm.

De Amsterdamse technische verenfabriek is op 1 januari 2012 overgenomen door de technische verenfabriek De Merwede uit de Meern. Sindsdien maakt ATV Springs als zelfstandige BV deel uit van de Merwede Groep.

Darüber hinaus beschäftigen sich unsere Konstrukteure und Techniker mit dem Entwickeln und Umsetzen komplexer Produktionsverfahren im Stanzbiegebereich. Die Projekte werden dabei in unseren Hallen zum Leben erweckt und nach einer gründlichen Überprüfung und einer Testproduktion, in die Fertigung des Kunden integriert. Dabei schulen wir die Mitarbeiter und führen sie an das realisierte Projekt heran.

Name: K&S Wire Products, Inc.
Description:
Founded in 1995, K & S Wire Products, Inc. is an industry leader in the wire forming and welding business.  From its manufacturing facility in Neosho, Missouri, the Company produces wire & metal forms, racks, shelves, grids, grills, grates, fan guards, point-of-purchase display racks, and animal cage floors and doors, primarily for industrial OEM clients and purchase displays for retail store fixture buyers and big box retailers.   We can handle any size project, small to large. 
We are an industry leader in the fixture store displays, wire forming, and welding, specializing in welding carbon steel, stainless steel, and galvanized wire.  From its manufacturing facility in Neosho, Missouri, the Company produces wire forms, racks, shelves, grids, grills, grates, fan guards, point-of-purchase display racks, animal cage floors and doors, primarily for industrial OEM clients and point of purchase displays (POP) for retail store fixture buyers.

The Company’s manufacturing process uses a wide range of advanced technology to create custom products, including the use of automatic High Speed Mesh Welders, Axis Press Welders,  X-Y Welders, as well as Robot and Standard Mig and Tig welding, Butt Welding, Tee Welding, and CNC Pressbrakes.  CNC wire forming capabilities include 2D and 3D CNC Wire Forming, and Multi-Head Benders, utilizing in-house tooling.  The experienced staff works with low and high carbon wire, galvanized and stainless steel wires, and some types of special wire upon request.  
Most of our wire sizes are from .078 to .5 wire diameters in bright basic, galvanized, and stainless steal wire.

With a commitment to durability, precision, and reliability, we deliver wire solutions that support both local and international projects. From residential needs to large-scale infrastructure, our mission is to provide products that combine strength and safety in every installation.

Name: Lark Wire & Infotech Limited

Name: VIOD veren
Description:
Bij VIOD veren geloven we al sinds 1950 in nauwe samenwerking met onze klanten. We verzorgen solide maatwerkoplossingen voor uiteenlopende toepassingen. Voor al uw veertechnische vraagstukken kunt u bij ons terecht. We denken graag met u mee over bijvoorbeeld gebruik en levensduur van op maat gemaakte veren. De continuïteit van uw bedrijfsvoering ligt ons na aan het hart.

BREED ASSORTIMENT VAN DE VEERSPECIALIST
Als één van Nederlands grootste verenproducenten leggen wij ons toe op het ontwikkelen, produceren en testen van een breed en uniek verenprogramma. Wij maken
drukveren,
trekveren,
torsieveren,
draadveren,
borgveren.

Daarbij beschikken we over geavanceerde, computergestuurde volautomatische en semi-automatische verenwikkelmachines, draaibanken, slijpautomaten, kogelstraalinstallaties, hardings- en ontlatingsovens alsmede een eigen epoxyspuiterij. U bent van harte welkom om een keer te komen kijken in onze fabriek!

VIOD VEREN, SOLIDE MAATWERK OPLOSSINGEN
We voldoen aan de NEN-ISO 9001 – 2015 norm, onder auspicien van Lloyds – het bewijs dat ons kwaliteitswaarborgsysteem aan strenge eisen voldoet. Krachtig, flexibel, snel reageren én volgens afspraak leveren, dat maakt VIOD veren tot een solide partner. Zo garanderen wij onze klanten de beste oplossingen met een constante kwaliteit.

PRODUCTIEMOGELIJKHEDEN
VIOD Veren kan druk-, trek-, torsie- en staalveren uit draad produceren uit KI-C verendraad (0,2 tot 18mm), roestvrijdraad (0,2-15mm), Chrom-Vanadium (10-80mm), Chrom-silicon (1-16mm), vierkant veerstaal (1-10mm) en rechthoekig draad. Alle producten worden naar de DIN normen geproduceerd (2095, 2096, 2097, 2098, 2088).

Name: Sassenscheidt Feindrahtwerk
Description:
Sassenscheidt & Co. GmbH liefert verzinkte und blanke Drahtprodukte für Bau, Industrie und Handwerk – flexibel, termintreu und nachhaltig. Seit über 100 Jahren kombinieren wir mittelständisches Unternehmertum mit modernster Fertigungstechnik. Unsere Lösungen kommen überall dort zum Einsatz, wo Qualität, Stabilität und Langlebigkeit gefragt sind. 

Als Teil der BenderWire Group verbinden wir Erfahrung mit Innovationskraft – für starke Drahtlösungen von morgen.

Dzięki zastosowaniu nowoczesnych technologii oferujemy produkty wysokiej jakości. Nasze indywidualne podejście do klienta oraz elastyczność w dopasowywaniu produktów to nasze kluczowe cechy. Zdobyliśmy zaufanie klientów zarówno w Polsce, jak i na rynkach międzynarodowych, dzięki naszemu doświadczeniu i wysokiej jakości naszych produktów.

Name: Les Ressorts Grange & Walter/Wilfart
Description:
Basée à Reims (Marne), Les Ressorts Grange & Walter/Wilfart est une entreprise française spécialisée dans la conception et la fabrication de ressorts sur mesure, du prototype à la grande série.

Notre expertise couvre une large gamme de produits destinés à des secteurs exigeants tels que le BTP, l’industrie lourde, l'agricole, l’énergie, la défense, le transport ou encore les carrières et mines.

 Nos atouts :

Fabrication de ressorts en fils de 0,3 mm à 40 mm

Travail de matériaux variés : acier (SH, 51CRV4...), inox, Inconel, ou autres alliages spécifiques

Accompagnement technique personnalisé pour chaque projet

Production française et maîtrise complète de la chaîne de fabrication

Nous mettons notre savoir-faire au service de solutions fiables, durables et parfaitement adaptées aux besoins de chaque client.

Nous collaborons également avec notre société sœur, Les Ressorts Grange & Walter (fondée en 1947), spécialisée dans les ressorts agricoles et équipée d’une chaîne de peinture poudre intégrée.

 Notre mission : offrir à chaque partenaire industriel un ressort sur mesure alliant performance, robustesse et précision.

 En savoir plus : https://ressorts-gw.com/
